q.en: Who is accountable for managing the Product Backlog?
q.sl: Kdo je odgovoren za upravljanje seznama izdelka?

options.en: The Scrum Master
The Product Owner
The Developers
The Scrum Team collectively

why.en: The Product Owner is accountable for effective Product Backlog management — developing and communicating the Product Goal, creating and ordering Product Backlog items, and ensuring the backlog is transparent, visible, and understood.
why.sl: Product Owner je odgovoren za učinkovito upravljanje seznama izdelka - razvijanje in komuniciranje cilja izdelka, ustvarjanje in razvrščanje postavk seznama izdelka ter zagotavljanje, da je seznam pregleden, viden in razumljen.

q.en: Who has the authority to cancel a Sprint?
q.sl: Kdo ima pooblastilo za preklic Sprinta?

options.en: The Scrum Master
Only the Product Owner
The Developers by consensus
Management or stakeholders

why.en: Only the Product Owner has the authority to cancel a Sprint. A Sprint would be cancelled if the Sprint Goal becomes obsolete.
why.sl: Samo Product Owner ima pooblastilo za preklic Sprinta. Sprint bi bil preklican, če bi cilj Sprinta postal zastarel.

q.en: Who manages the Sprint Backlog?
q.sl: Kdo upravlja seznam dela Sprinta?

options.en: The Product Owner
The Scrum Master
The Developers
The Scrum Team collectively

why.en: The Sprint Backlog is a plan by and for the Developers. They manage it and update it throughout the Sprint as more is learned.
why.sl: Seznam dela Sprinta je načrt razvojnih delavcev in za njih. Oni ga upravljajo in posodabljajo med Sprintom, ko se naučijo več.

q.en: The Product Owner accountability can be shared among multiple people acting as a committee.
q.sl: Odgovornost Product Ownerja je mogoče deliti med več oseb, ki delujejo kot komisija.

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. The Product Owner is one person, not a committee. They may represent the needs of many stakeholders, but accountability cannot be divided.
why.sl: Ne drži. Product Owner je ena oseba, ne komisija. Lahko zastopa potrebe številnih deležnikov, vendar odgovornosti ne moremo deliti.

q.en: The Scrum Master is best described as:
q.sl: Scrum Master je najbolje opisan kot:

options.en: A project manager who plans the work
A true leader who serves the Scrum Team and organization
options.sl: Pravi vodja, ki služi Scrum timu in organizaciji

options.en: A task assigner for the Developers
A neutral facilitator with no real accountability

why.en: The Scrum Master is a true leader who serves the Scrum Team, the Product Owner, and the organization. The Scrum Master is accountable for the Scrum Team's effectiveness — not a project manager, not a task-assigner.
why.sl: Scrum Master je pravi vodja, ki služi Scrum timu, Product Ownerju in organizaciji. Scrum Master je odgovoren za učinkovitost Scrum tima - ni vodje projekta ali dodeljivalca nalog.

q.en: Who is responsible for monitoring progress toward the Sprint Goal?
q.sl: Kdo je odgovoren za spremljanje napredka proti cilju Sprinta?

options.en: The Scrum Master
The Product Owner
The Developers
A delivery manager

why.en: The Developers inspect progress toward the Sprint Goal at least daily (typically in the Daily Scrum) and adjust the Sprint Backlog as needed.
why.sl: Razvijalci pregledajo napredek do cilja Sprinta vsaj dnevno (običajno v Dnevnem Scrumu) in po potrebi prilagodijo seznam dela Sprinta.

q.en: What is the maximum duration of a Sprint?
q.sl: Kakšna je največja trajnost Sprinta?

options.en: One week
Two weeks
One month
Three months

why.en: Sprints are fixed-length events of one month or less to create consistency. A new Sprint starts immediately after the previous one concludes.
why.sl: Sprinti so dokončni dogodki trajanja en mesec ali manj, da se ustvari doslednost. Novi Sprint se začne takoj po zaključku prejšnjega.

q.en: The Daily Scrum is time-boxed to:
q.sl: Dnevni Scrum je omejen na:

options.en: 15 minutes
30 minutes
As long as the Developers need
options.sl: Toliko časa, kot ga potrebujejo razvijalci

options.en: 1 hour

why.en: The Daily Scrum is a 15-minute event for the Developers. Holding it at the same time and place each day reduces complexity.
why.sl: Dnevni Scrum je 15-minutni dogodek za razvojne delavce. Njegovo izvajanje ob isti uri in na istem kraju vsak dan zmanjša kompleksnost.

q.en: For a one-month Sprint, Sprint Planning is time-boxed to a maximum of:
q.sl: Za mesečni Sprint je Načrtovanje Sprinta omejeno na največ:

options.en: 2 hours
4 hours
8 hours
No explicit limit

why.en: Sprint Planning is time-boxed to a maximum of eight hours for a one-month Sprint. For shorter Sprints, the event is usually shorter.
why.sl: Načrtovanje Sprinta je omejeno na največ osem ur za mesečni Sprint. Za krajše Sprinte je dogodek običajno krajši.

q.en: For a one-month Sprint, the Sprint Review is time-boxed to a maximum of:
q.sl: Za mesečni Sprint je Pregled Sprinta omejen na največ:

options.en: 2 hours
4 hours
6 hours
8 hours

why.en: Sprint Review is time-boxed to a maximum of four hours for a one-month Sprint. Shorter Sprints have shorter Reviews.
why.sl: Pregled Sprinta je omejen na največ štiri ure za mesečni Sprint. Krajši Sprinti imajo krajše Preglede.

q.en: For a one-month Sprint, the Sprint Retrospective is time-boxed to a maximum of:
q.sl: Za mesečni Sprint je Retrospektiva Sprinta omejena na največ:

options.en: 1 hour
2 hours
3 hours
4 hours

why.en: The Sprint Retrospective is time-boxed to a maximum of three hours for a one-month Sprint.
why.sl: Retrospektiva Sprinta je omejena na največ tri ure za mesečni Sprint.

q.en: Who must attend the Daily Scrum?
q.sl: Kdo se mora udeležiti Dnevnega Scruma?

options.en: The entire Scrum Team plus all stakeholders
options.sl: Celoten Scrum tim in vsi deležniki

options.en: The Developers. The Product Owner and Scrum Master attend if actively working on items
options.sl: Razvijalci. Product Owner in Scrum Master se udeležita, če aktivno delujeta na postavkah

options.en: Only the Scrum Master and Developers
Only the Product Owner and Developers

why.en: The Daily Scrum is for the Developers. The Product Owner or Scrum Master participate as Developers only if they are actively working on items in the Sprint Backlog.
why.sl: Dnevni Scrum je namenjen razvojnim delavcem. Product Owner ali Scrum Master se udeležita kot razvojni delavci le, če aktivno delujeta na postavkah v seznamu dela Sprinta.

q.en: The Sprint Review is a status meeting where the Scrum Team reports progress to management.
q.sl: Pregled Sprinta je status srečanje, kjer Scrum tim poroča o napredku vodstvu.

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. The Sprint Review is a working session to inspect the Increment and adapt the Product Backlog based on collaboration between the Scrum Team and stakeholders. It is not a status-report meeting.
why.sl: Ne drži. Pregled Sprinta je deloviščna seja za pregledovanje Inkrementа in prilagoditev seznama izdelka na podlagi sodelovanja med Scrum timom in deležniki. Ni status-poročilna seja.

q.en: When does the next Sprint start?
q.sl: Kdaj se začne naslednji Sprint?

options.en: After the Product Owner formally approves the Increment
options.sl: Ko Product Owner formalno odobri Inkrement

options.en: Immediately after the conclusion of the previous Sprint
After a release planning meeting
Whenever the Developers are ready

why.en: A new Sprint starts immediately after the conclusion of the previous Sprint. There is no gap.
why.sl: Novi Sprint se začne takoj po zaključku prejšnjega Sprinta. Ni vrzeli.

q.en: The primary purpose of the Sprint Retrospective is to:
q.sl: Glavni namen Retrospektive Sprinta je:

options.en: Demonstrating the Increment to stakeholders
Planning the next Sprint
Inspecting how the Sprint went and identifying improvements
options.sl: Pregledovanje, kako je potekal Sprint, in opredelitev izboljšav

options.en: Allowing the Scrum Master to give feedback to individuals
options.sl: Omogočanje Scrum Masterju, da da povratne informacije posameznikom

why.en: The Sprint Retrospective plans ways to increase quality and effectiveness. The Scrum Team inspects how the last Sprint went regarding individuals, interactions, processes, tools, and the Definition of Done, then identifies high-priority improvements.
why.sl: Retrospektiva Sprinta načrtuje načine za povečanje kakovosti in učinkovitosti. Scrum tim pregleda, kako je potekala pretekla Sprint glede posameznikov, interakcij, procesov, orodij in Definicije Končanega, nato pa identificira visoko prioritetne izboljšave.

q.en: Which of the following are formal events in Scrum? (Select all that apply)
q.sl: Kaj je Inkrement?

options.en: The Sprint
Sprint Planning
Daily Scrum
Backlog Refinement
Sprint Review
Sprint Retrospective
Release Planning

why.en: There are exactly five events: the Sprint (a container for the others), Sprint Planning, Daily Scrum, Sprint Review, and Sprint Retrospective. Backlog Refinement is an ongoing activity, not a formal event. Release Planning is not part of Scrum.
why.sl: Inkrement je vsota vseh postavk seznama izdelka, ki so dokončane med Sprintom. Več Incrementov se lahko ustvari med Sprintom. Vsak Increment je sestavljen iz dokončanega, preizkušenega in uporabnega dela.

q.en: When is a Product Backlog item considered 'Done'?
q.sl: Definicija Končanega je:

options.en: When the Developers say it's done
options.sl: Seznam lastnosti, ki se pričakujejo od Inkrementа

options.en: When the Product Owner accepts it in the Sprint Review
options.sl: Sklop meril, ki jih mora Inkrement izpolnjevati

options.en: When it meets the Definition of Done
options.sl: Merilo za končanje vsake postavke seznama izdelka

options.en: When it is deployed to production

why.en: A Product Backlog item is Done when it meets the Definition of Done. The moment it meets DoD, it becomes part of the Increment.
why.sl: Definicija Končanega je formalna opis stanja Inkrementа, ko se šteje za izmenjujoče se. Razvojni delavci se skladajo z Definicijo Končanega za vsako postavko, ki jo izvedejo.

q.en: The Sprint Goal is:
q.sl: Kdo je odgovoren za Definicijo Končanega?

options.en: A list of all work selected for the Sprint
The single objective for the Sprint
A forecast of future Sprints
A contract with stakeholders

why.en: The Sprint Goal is the single objective for the Sprint. It is the commitment for the Sprint Backlog and creates coherence and focus for the Developers.
why.sl: Definicija Končanega je značilnost razvojnega tima. Razvijalci so odgovorni za njeno sprejemanje in zagotavljanje, da je vsak Inkrement v skladu z njo.

q.en: The Product Goal is best described as:
q.sl: Se lahko Definicija Končanega spremeni med Sprintom?

options.en: A deadline for delivery
options.sl: Da, kadar koli se razvijalci strinjajo

options.en: The long-term objective for the Scrum Team — a future state of the product
The same thing as the Sprint Goal
options.sl: Ne, ima biti dosledna skozi Sprint

options.en: A binding contract with customers
options.sl: Da, vendar samo za nove stvari

why.en: The Product Goal describes a future state of the product. It is the long-term objective for the Scrum Team and serves as the commitment for the Product Backlog.
why.sl: Definicija Končanega se ne sme spreminjati med Sprintom. Mora biti dosledna, da zagotovi preglednost in omogoči kvalitetne primerjave med Sprinti.

q.en: The Product Backlog is an ordered list.
q.sl: Kaj je cilj Sprinta?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. The Product Backlog is an emergent, ordered list of what is needed to improve the product. Ordering is a responsibility of the Product Owner.
why.sl: Cilj Sprinta je merljiv cilj za Sprint. Razvijalci izbirajo postavke iz seznama izdelka in jih vključijo v cilj Sprinta. Cilj Sprinta je sestavljen iz izbranih postavk in jih neposredno povezuje s pričakovanimi rezultati.

q.en: An Increment is:
q.sl: Kdo je odgovoren za razvoj ali predlaganje cilj Sprinta?

options.en: All work completed in the Sprint, including unfinished items
A concrete stepping stone toward the Product Goal that is Done and usable
A release to production customers
The set of user stories selected for the Sprint

why.en: An Increment is a concrete stepping stone toward the Product Goal. Each Increment is additive to all prior Increments and thoroughly verified. It must meet the Definition of Done to be presented at the Sprint Review.
why.sl: Med Načrtovanjem Sprinta Razvijalci delajo s Product Ownerjem, da razvijejo cilj Sprinta. Cilj Sprinta je oblikovan kot rezultat partnerstva.

q.en: Which artifact is paired with the correct commitment? (Select all that apply)
q.sl: Se lahko cilj Sprinta spremeni med Sprintom?

options.en: Product Backlog → Product Goal
Sprint Backlog → Sprint Goal
Increment → Definition of Done
Product Backlog → Sprint Goal
Increment → Product Goal

why.en: The three commitments are: Product Goal (for the Product Backlog), Sprint Goal (for the Sprint Backlog), and Definition of Done (for the Increment).
why.sl: Cilj Sprinta je nepopustljiv med Sprintom. Razvijalci so se zavezali k cilju, he pa ga lahko revidirajo le s privolitvijo Product Ownerja.

q.en: Who creates the Definition of Done?
q.sl: Kaj je seznam izdelka?

options.en: The Product Owner establishes the Definition of Done for each Increment
options.sl: Seznam dela, ki ga je treba opraviti med Sprintom

options.en: The Scrum Master creates and enforces the Definition of Done for the team
options.sl: Uređeni seznam izdelkov, ki jih ima podjetje

options.en: If an organizational standard exists, the team follows it as a minimum; otherwise they create their own
options.sl: Dinamičen seznam lastnosti, izboljšav, popravkov in ostalih elementov potrebnih za izdelek

options.en: The stakeholders determine the Definition of Done collectively at the Sprint Review
options.sl: Preprosto seznam vsega, kar je bilo kdaj zaključeno

why.en: If the organization has a Definition of Done as a standard, all Scrum Teams must follow it as a minimum. If no organizational standard exists, the Scrum Team must create one appropriate for the product.
why.sl: Seznam izdelka je dinamičen seznam lastnosti, izboljšav, popravkov, funkcionalnosti in ostalih prispevkov k izdelku. To je edini vir informacij o tem, kaj bi bil izdelek izpolnjeval.

q.en: According to the Scrum Guide, a Scrum Team is typically:
q.sl: Kdo je odgovoren za prioritizacijo seznama izdelka?

options.en: 7 ± 2 people
10 or fewer people
Exactly 9 people
As many as needed

why.en: The Scrum Guide says Scrum Teams are typically 10 or fewer people. Smaller teams communicate better and are more productive; if they get too large, they should consider reorganizing into multiple cohesive Scrum Teams.
why.sl: Product Owner je odgovoren za upravljanje, razvoj, razvrščanje in prioritizacijo seznama izdelka.

q.en: What does 'self-managing' mean for a Scrum Team?
q.sl: Ali je seznam dela Sprinta za uporabo le med Sprintom?

options.en: They have no manager and answer to nobody
options.sl: Da, je osebni dokument samo med Sprintom

options.en: They internally decide who does what, when, and how
They don't need a Scrum Master
Each member manages their own work in isolation

why.en: Self-managing Scrum Teams internally decide who does what, when, and how. They are also cross-functional, meaning members have all the skills necessary to create value each Sprint.
why.sl: Seznam dela Sprinta je deljeni dokument, ki ga razvijalci uporabljajo za izvedbo Sprinta. Ni omejen samo na trajanje Sprinta, je pa najpomembnejši med trenutnim Sprintom.

q.en: When multiple Scrum Teams work together on the same product, they share:
q.sl: Kaj je Izpopolnjevanje seznama izdelka?

options.en: Only the Scrum Master, but each team has its own PO and backlog
The Product Owner, the Product Backlog, and the Product Goal
The Definition of Done only, with separate PO per team
options.sl: Proces uređivanja in razjasnjevanja postavk seznama izdelka ter razvrščanja jih po prioriteti

options.en: Nothing — each team operates independently

why.en: If multiple Scrum Teams work together on a product, they share the same Product Goal, Product Backlog, and Product Owner — to maintain a single source of direction and value.
why.sl: Izpopolnjevanje je neprekinjeni proces dodajanja podrobnosti, vzdevne, specifičnosti, ocen in vzporeda postavk seznama izdelka. To je neprekinjeni proces vzdrževanja in razvoja seznama izdelka.

q.en: Which of the following are the five Scrum Values? (Select all that apply)
q.sl: Kaj je Sprinti zaokužena?

options.en: Commitment
Focus
Trust
Openness
Respect
Accountability
Courage

why.en: The five Scrum Values are Commitment, Focus, Openness, Respect, and Courage. Trust is a result of living the values, not one of them. Accountability is a concept in Scrum but not one of the five values.
why.sl: Dolžina Sprinta je dosledna. Scrum timovi izberejo trajanje Sprinta (navadno 1-4 tedni) in se ga držijo dosledno. To omogoča predvidljivost in ritem.

q.en: Which are the three pillars of empiricism in Scrum? (Select all that apply)
q.sl: Kaj je empiričnost v Scrumu?

options.en: Transparency
Inspection
Adaptation
Commitment
Communication

why.en: Empiricism rests on three pillars: Transparency (the process must be visible), Inspection (artifacts and progress are frequently inspected), and Adaptation (adjustments are made when deviations are detected).
why.sl: Empiričnost je temelj Scruma. Odločitve se sprejemajo na osnovi izkušenj in opazovanj, ne zgolj na teoriji ali prvotnih napovedih.

q.en: During the Sprint, the Developers realize they have selected more work than they can finish. What should they do?
q.sl: Tri stebre empiričnosti Scruma so:

options.en: Extend the Sprint to finish the work
Work overtime to complete everything
Work with the Product Owner to renegotiate scope within the Sprint Goal
Cancel the Sprint

why.en: As more is learned, scope may be clarified and renegotiated with the Product Owner — without compromising the Sprint Goal. Sprints are not extended; the Sprint Backlog is adjusted.
why.sl: Tri stebre empiričnosti so preglednost, pregled in prilagoditev. Te tri stebre podpirajo empiričnost v Scrumu.

q.en: If the Sprint Goal becomes obsolete during the Sprint:
q.sl: Kaj je Preglednost v kontekstu Scruma?

options.en: The Developers continue with the original plan
The Scrum Master must extend the Sprint
options.sl: Razumljivi prikazi Scrum artefaktov in napredka

options.en: The Product Owner may cancel the Sprint
The Scrum Team must escalate to management

why.en: If the Sprint Goal becomes obsolete, the Sprint may be cancelled. Only the Product Owner has the authority to cancel a Sprint.
why.sl: Preglednost pomeni, da so Scrum artefakti, cilji in načrti jasni, dostopni in razumljivi vsem deležnikom. To omogoča učinkovito pregledovanje in prilagoditev.

q.en: Scrum requires which document for capturing product requirements?
q.sl: Kaj je Pregled v kontekstu Scruma?

options.en: User stories
Use cases
options.sl: Redno preverjanje Scrum artefaktov in napredka ter opredelitev sprememb

options.en: A formal specification
No specific format is mandated

why.en: Scrum does not prescribe a format for Product Backlog items. User stories are a common practice but are not required by Scrum.
why.sl: Pregled pomeni redno pregledovanje Scrum artefaktov in napredka, da se zagotovi, da so v skladu s pričakovanji in cilji. To omogoča prilagoditev.

q.en: Product Backlog refinement is a formal Scrum event with a mandatory time-box.
q.sl: Kaj je Prilagoditev v kontekstu Scruma?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. Refinement is an ongoing activity to add detail, estimates, and order to Product Backlog items. It is not one of the five formal events.
why.sl: Prilagoditev pomeni spremembo procesov, praks in pristopa na osnovi pregledovanja in učenja. To je nenehno izboljšanje in prilagajanje.

q.en: Who can change the Sprint Backlog during the Sprint?
q.sl: Kateri so Scrum vrednosti?

options.en: Only the Product Owner
Only the Scrum Master
The Developers
Any stakeholder with a legitimate need

why.en: The Sprint Backlog is owned by the Developers. They update it throughout the Sprint as they learn more and progress toward the Sprint Goal.
why.sl: Pet Scrum vrednosti so: predanost, osredotočenost, odprtost, spoštovanje in pogum. Te vrednosti vodijo Scrum tim pri njegovem delu in odnosih.

q.en: A Scrum Master is essentially a renamed project manager.
q.sl: Kaj pomeni Predanost v Scrumu?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. A Scrum Master is a true leader who serves the Scrum Team and organization. They do not manage people, assign tasks, or own delivery commitments the way a traditional project manager would.
why.sl: Predanost pomeni, da je Scrum tim zavezana k ciljem Sprinta in Definiciji Končanega. Razvijalci se zavezujejo k ciljem, ki jih sami postavijo.

q.en: A stakeholder asks the Developers to add a new feature mid-Sprint. What is the most appropriate response?
q.sl: Kaj pomeni Osredotočenost v Scrumu?

options.en: The Developers add it immediately to be responsive
The Scrum Master adds it to the Sprint Backlog
options.sl: Osredotočenost na cilj Sprinta in obveznost k njemu

options.en: The request is directed to the Product Owner, who may add it to the Product Backlog for consideration in a future Sprint
The Sprint is cancelled so the work can be replanned

why.en: The Product Owner is the single source of ordering for the Product Backlog. New requests go to the Product Owner. Only the Product Owner can renegotiate Sprint scope, and only in a way that doesn't endanger the Sprint Goal.
why.sl: Osredotočenost pomeni, da se Scrum tim osredotoči na cilj Sprinta in ga ne izgublja iz pogleda. Vsi prizadevanja so namenjena doseganju cilja.

q.en: The Scrum Team is cross-functional. This primarily means:
q.sl: Kaj pomeni Odprtost v Scrumu?

options.en: Every Developer can do every task equally well
The team has all the skills to create value each Sprint without outside help
options.sl: Odprtost za nove ideje, povratne informacije in spremembe

options.en: The team rotates roles every Sprint
The team reports to multiple functional managers

why.en: Cross-functional means the Scrum Team collectively has all the skills required to create value each Sprint. It does not mean every individual has every skill.
why.sl: Odprtost pomeni, da je Scrum tim pripravljen na nove ideje, povratne informacije, spremembe in učenje. Odprti so za to, da se stvari spremenijo in izboljšajo.

q.en: The Definition of Done can evolve over time as the Scrum Team matures and capabilities improve.
q.sl: Kaj pomeni Spoštovanje v Scrumu?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. The Scrum Guide 2020 states that as Scrum Teams mature, their Definitions of Done are expected to expand to include more stringent criteria for higher quality.
why.sl: Spoštovanje pomeni, da se člani Scrum tima spoštujejo med seboj, spoštujejo druge vloge in spoštujejo tudi zunanje deležnike. To je temelj zaupanja.

q.en: The purpose of a Sprint is to:
q.sl: Kaj pomeni Pogum v Scrumu?

options.en: Maximize Developer productivity
Complete all planned Product Backlog items
options.sl: Pogum, da se povede težke klepete in sprejmejo težke odločitve

options.en: Meet a release deadline
Turn ideas into value through a Done Increment

why.en: Sprints exist to create a Done Increment that delivers value — not to maximize activity, tick off planned items, or hit a fixed release date. The purpose is outcome-focused: usable working product that advances the Product Goal at a sustainable cadence.
why.sl: Pogum pomeni, da ima Scrum tim pogum, da se sooči s težavami, da govori o težkih temah in da sprejme spremembe. To je potrebno za izboljšave in učenje.

q.en: In what way does the Scrum Master serve the Product Owner?
q.sl: Ali so Scrum vrednosti opcijske ali obvezne?

options.en: By managing the Product Backlog directly
By helping find techniques for effective Product Goal definition and backlog management
options.sl: Obvezne - vsak Scrum tim jih mora prevzeti

options.en: By writing user stories on behalf of the PO
By deciding release dates

why.en: The Scrum Master helps the Scrum Team — including the PO — find effective practices: defining the Product Goal, managing the Product Backlog, and empirical planning in a complex environment.
why.sl: Scrum vrednosti so temelj Scrum ogrodja. Brez njih je nemogoče implementirati Scrum pravilno. So obvezne, ne opcijske.

q.en: In what way does the Scrum Master serve the Developers?
q.sl: Kaj je Product Goal?

options.en: By assigning tasks to Developers
By reporting their progress to management
options.sl: Dolgoročni cilj za izdelek, ki vodi Product Backlog

options.en: By coaching them in self-management and removing impediments
By choosing which Product Backlog items they work on

why.en: The SM coaches the Developers in self-management and cross-functionality, helps them focus on creating high-value Increments that meet the DoD, and removes impediments to their progress.
why.sl: Product Goal je dolgoročni cilj za izdelek. On vodi razvoj seznama izdelka in Sprintov. Sprinti so koraki proti doseganju Product Goal-a.

q.en: How does the Scrum Master serve the organization?
q.sl: Kdo je odgovoren za Product Goal?

options.en: By tracking team velocity for executive dashboards
By leading, training, and coaching the organization in Scrum adoption and planning implementations
By setting release dates with the business
By reporting risks and dependencies to project managers

why.en: The SM serves the organization by leading, training, and coaching its Scrum adoption, planning and advising implementations, and helping employees and stakeholders understand an empirical approach.
why.sl: Product Owner je odgovoren za razvoj in obveščanje Product Goal-a. To je dolgoročni uspeh izdelka.

q.en: Who is accountable for establishing Scrum as defined in the Scrum Guide?
q.sl: Ali se Product Goal spremeni med Sprintom?

options.en: The Product Owner
The Scrum Master
The Developers
The organization's leadership

why.en: The Scrum Master is accountable for establishing Scrum as defined in the Scrum Guide. They do this by helping everyone understand Scrum theory and practice.
why.sl: Product Goal je lahko spremenjena s privolitvijo Product Ownerja, vendar se to ne dogaja pogosto. To je dolgoročna smer, ne kratkoročni cilj.

q.en: During Sprint Planning, who proposes how the product could increase its value in the upcoming Sprint?
q.sl: Kaj je Stakeholder?

options.en: The Scrum Master
The Product Owner
options.sl: Oseba ali organizacija s pričakovanji glede izdelka

options.en: The Developers
The stakeholders

why.en: In Sprint Planning Topic One ('Why is this Sprint valuable?'), the Product Owner proposes how the product could increase its value. The whole Scrum Team then collaborates to define a Sprint Goal.
why.sl: Deležnik je oseba ali organizacija s pričakovanji glede izdelka, ki jo zanima uspeh produkta. To vključuje kupce, uporabnike, vodstvo in drugo.

q.en: During Sprint Planning, who decides how many Product Backlog items to include in the Sprint?
q.sl: Se deležniki vedno sodeluje pri Scrumu?

options.en: The Product Owner, based on priorities
The Scrum Master, based on past velocity
The Developers, forecasting their capacity in collaboration with the Product Owner
Stakeholders, during Sprint Planning

why.en: The Developers forecast what they can accomplish during the Sprint. They discuss with the PO to make selections, but the capacity call belongs to the Developers.
why.sl: Deležniki se udeležijo Sprinta, vendar ne morajo biti vedno prisotni. Njihova vloga je spremenljiva in odvisna od potreb. V Pregledu Sprinta se jih posebej vključi.

q.en: Which of the following are true about the Sprint? (Select all that apply)
q.sl: Kaj je Scrum Board?

options.en: A new Sprint starts immediately after the previous one concludes
options.sl: Novi Sprint se začne takoj po zaključku prejšnjega

options.en: A Sprint may be extended if the Developers need more time
options.sl: Sprint lahko podaljšamo, če Razvijalci potrebujejo več časa

options.en: All other Scrum events occur within the Sprint
options.sl: Vsi ostali Scrum dogodki se dogajajo znotraj Sprinta

options.en: Sprints are fixed length of one month or less
options.sl: Sprinti so fiksne dolžine enega meseca ali manj

options.en: The Sprint can be cancelled if the Sprint Goal becomes obsolete
options.sl: Sprint lahko prekličemo, če Cilj Sprinta postane zastarel

why.en: Sprints are fixed-length (one month max) and cannot be extended. They may be cancelled (only by the PO) if the Sprint Goal becomes obsolete. All other events happen within the Sprint.
why.sl: Scrum Board je predstava seznama dela Sprinta, ki prikazuje status posameznih postavk. To je orodje za vizualizacijo in pregledovanje napredka.

q.en: The Daily Scrum improves communications, identifies impediments, and reduces the need for other meetings.
q.sl: Ali je Scrum Board obvezna orodje?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. Per the Scrum Guide, the Daily Scrum improves communications, identifies impediments, promotes quick decision-making, and consequently reduces the need for other meetings.
why.sl: Scrum Board je priporočeno orodje za vizualizacijo dela, ni pa je obvezna del Scrum ogrodja. Vsak tim si izbere, kaj mu ustreza.

q.en: The Sprint Retrospective is attended by:
q.sl: Kaj je Burndown Chart?

options.en: The Developers only
options.sl: Grafikon, ki prikazuje preostalo delo v Sprinte

options.en: The Product Owner only
The entire Scrum Team
The Scrum Team and key stakeholders

why.en: The Sprint Retrospective is for the whole Scrum Team — Developers, Product Owner, and Scrum Master — to inspect itself and identify improvements.
why.sl: Burndown Chart je grafikon, ki prikazuje količino preostalega dela v Sprinte. Pomaga pri sledenju napredka in predvidljivosti zaključka.

q.en: For Sprints shorter than one month, the other Scrum events are usually proportionally shorter.
q.sl: Ali je Burndown Chart obvezen?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. Event time-boxes scale down for shorter Sprints. For example, Sprint Planning maxes at eight hours for a one-month Sprint and is usually shorter for shorter Sprints.
why.sl: Burndown Chart je priporočeno orodje za vizualizacijo, vendar ni obvezno. Scrum ogrodja ne zahteva specifičnih metrik ali grafikonov.

q.en: The Sprint Backlog is composed of:
q.sl: Kaj je Velocity v Scrumu?

options.en: Only the selected Product Backlog items
The Sprint Goal (why), selected items (what), and an actionable delivery plan (how)
options.sl: Povprečna količina dela, ki jo Tim zaključi v Sprinte

options.en: A list of daily tasks assigned
A Gantt chart of the Sprint timeline

why.en: The Sprint Backlog has three parts: Sprint Goal (why), selected PBIs (what), and an actionable plan for delivery (how). It makes visible the work needed to achieve the Sprint Goal.
why.sl: Velocity je povprečna količina dela (običajno izmerjena v Story Points), ki jo Tim zaključi v Sprinte. To je orodje za načrtovanje in napovedovanje.

q.en: What is the primary purpose of the Definition of Done?
q.sl: Ali je znano Velocity na začetku projekta?

options.en: List acceptance criteria for one item
Give everyone a shared understanding of what 'Done' means for the Increment
Mark when the Sprint ends
Enforce coding standards across teams

why.en: The Definition of Done creates transparency by giving everyone a shared understanding of what work was completed as part of the Increment. It's the commitment for the Increment.
why.sl: Velocity se razvija skozi Sprinte. Na začetku projekta je ni mogoče predvideti, ker tim potrebuje čas, da se nauči in etablira svoje delovne procese.

q.en: Multiple Increments can be created within a single Sprint.
q.sl: Kaj se zgodi, če Razvijalci med Sprintom odkrijejo, da je njihova ocena bila napačna?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. An Increment is created whenever a Product Backlog item meets the Definition of Done. Multiple Increments may be created within a Sprint, each usable as soon as Done.
why.sl: Če Razvijalci med Sprintom odkrijejo napako v oceni, lahko s pogajanji in sporazumom spremenijo svoj delni napredek ali preusmerjujejo delo za dosego cilj Sprinta.

q.en: Which artifact-to-commitment pairing is correct?
q.sl: Kaj je User Story?

options.en: Product Backlog → Definition of Done
Sprint Backlog → Product Goal
options.sl: Kratka, enostavna opis zahtevka iz perspektive uporabnika

options.en: Increment → Sprint Goal
Sprint Backlog → Sprint Goal

why.en: The three pairings: Product Backlog → Product Goal, Sprint Backlog → Sprint Goal, Increment → Definition of Done.
why.sl: User Story je kratka, enostavna opis funkcionalnosti iz perspektive uporabnika. Format je: Kot [tip uporabnika], želim [akcija], da bi [razlog].

q.en: Product Backlog items should be broken down so they can be Done within a single Sprint.
q.sl: Ali morajo biti vse postavke seznama izdelka User Stories?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. Items that can be Done by the Scrum Team within one Sprint are deemed ready for selection in Sprint Planning. Appropriate sizing is part of refinement.
why.sl: Sestavke seznama izdelka ni potrebno formatirati kot User Stories. Lahko so zahtevki, Bug fiksni, tehnični dolgi in drugo. Format je spremenljiv.

q.en: What are the Developers accountable for?
q.sl: Kaj je Definition of Ready?

options.en: Writing and testing code exclusively
Creating the Sprint Backlog plan, ensuring quality through DoD, daily adaptation, and mutual accountability
options.sl: Kriteriji, ki jih mora izpolnjevati postavka, pred začetkom dela

options.en: Managing the Product Backlog and prioritizing items
Reporting progress to the Scrum Master daily

why.en: The Scrum Guide 2020 lists these as the Developers' accountabilities. 'Developers' refers to anyone creating the Increment — not just programmers.
why.sl: Definition of Ready je sklop meril, ki jih mora izpolnjevati postavka seznama izdelka, preden se jo lahko vzame v Sprint. To je različno od Definicije Končanega.

q.en: A single person can hold both the Scrum Master and the Developer accountabilities on the same team.
q.sl: Ali je Definition of Ready obvezna v Scrumu?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. The accountabilities are distinct but can be held by the same person. The Scrum Master participates as a Developer when actively working on Sprint Backlog items.
why.sl: Definition of Ready je dobra praksa, vendar nije obvezna del Scrum ogrodja. Nekateri timovi jo uporabljajo, drugi pa jo ne.

q.en: What does 'cross-functional' mean for a Scrum Team?
q.sl: Kaj je Daily Standup in kako se razlikuje od Daily Scruma?

options.en: Every member has every skill needed
Members can rotate through departments quarterly
options.sl: Daily Standup je kratko, Daily Scrum je bolj podrobno

options.en: The team collectively has all skills to create value each Sprint without outside help
options.sl: Daily Standup je samo za razvojne delavce, Daily Scrum je skupni

options.en: The team reports to multiple functional managers

why.en: Cross-functional means the team collectively possesses all the skills required to create value each Sprint. Individual specialization is fine; collective capability is what matters.
why.sl: V Scrumu se to imenuje Dnevni Scrum, ne Daily Standup. Dnevni Scrum je 15-minutni dogodek za razvojne delavce, da si medsebojno koordinirajo delo.

q.en: Which statements about empiricism in Scrum are true? (Select all that apply)
q.sl: Kaj bi morali razvijalci narediti, če med Sprintom odkrijejo, da je cilj nedosegljiv?

options.en: Empiricism means making decisions based on what is observed
options.sl: Empiričnost pomeni sprejemanje odločitev na podlagi tega, kar je opaziti

options.en: Empiricism requires detailed upfront planning
Empiricism rests on Transparency, Inspection, and Adaptation
options.sl: Empiričnost je podprta s preglednostjo, pregledom in prilagoditvijo

options.en: Empiricism is optional in Scrum
Empiricism helps the Scrum Team deal with complexity
options.sl: Empiričnost pomaga Scrum timu, da se sooči s kompleksnostjo

why.en: Empiricism asserts that knowledge comes from experience and decisions are based on what is observed. Its three pillars are Transparency, Inspection, and Adaptation. It is foundational — not optional.
why.sl: Če razvijalci odkrijejo, da je cilj Sprinta nedosegljiv, morajo to obvestiti Product Ownerja čim prej. Skupaj lahko preispitajo prioritete ali prilagodijo cilj.

q.en: If an artifact's transparency is incomplete, what is the risk?
q.sl: Kako se spopade Scrum s prihodnjimi zahtevkami med Sprintom?

options.en: The team will be more efficient
options.sl: Razvijalci jih morajo vključiti v delo

options.en: Decisions based on distorted information may be flawed and increase risk
options.sl: Dodajajo se v seznam izdelka za prihodnje Sprinte

options.en: The Sprint will automatically fail
There is no risk

why.en: Without transparency, inspection is misleading and adaptation is misdirected. Decisions based on distorted artifacts can reduce value and increase risk.
why.sl: Nove zahtevke med Sprintom se dodajo v seznam izdelka (ne v seznam dela Sprinta), da se jih prioritizira za prihodnje Sprinte. Sprint je nedotaknjen, razen v posebnih primerih.

q.en: The Scrum Values (Commitment, Focus, Openness, Respect, Courage) are optional guidelines.
q.sl: Ali je Scrum primeren za velike projekte?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. The Scrum Values are integral to Scrum. When embodied by the Scrum Team, the pillars of empiricism come to life and trust is built.
why.sl: Scrum se lahko skalira za velike projekte z več timov. Obstajajo orodja in prakse, kot so SAFe, Scrum of Scrums in drugo, za koordinacijo več Scrum timov.

q.en: When should a Scrum Team adapt?
q.sl: Kaj je Scrum of Scrums?

options.en: Only at the Sprint Retrospective
As soon as inspection detects deviations outside acceptable limits
options.sl: Način za koordinacijo več Scrum timov

options.en: Only when management approves
Never mid-Sprint

why.en: Adaptation must be done as soon as possible to minimize further deviation. The Scrum Team does not wait for a formal event to adapt if inspection reveals a problem.
why.sl: Scrum of Scrums je pristop za koordinacijo več Scrum timov. Predstavniki vsakega tima se srečajo, da rešijo medsebojne odvisnosti in usklajevanja.

q.en: The Developers are frequently interrupted with urgent requests from outside the team. What should the Scrum Master do?
q.sl: Ali mora biti Scrum tim vedno na isti lokaciji?

options.en: Instruct the stakeholders to stop interrupting
Coach both sides to protect focus, route requests through the Product Owner, and address root causes
Reassign the requests to other teams without discussion
Ignore it — it's not the SM's concern

why.en: The Scrum Master serves the team and the organization. Chronic interruptions are a systemic impediment. The SM coaches both sides and works on the underlying causes.
why.sl: Scrum tim ne mora biti na isti lokaciji. Lahko je distribuiran. Vendar je sodelovanje in komunikacija ključna, zato je treba zagotoviti učinkovito komunikacijo.

q.en: A Developer says the Sprint Goal cannot be achieved. What should the Scrum Master do?
q.sl: Kako Scrum podpira daljino delo?

options.en: Extend the Sprint by a few days
Cancel the Sprint immediately
options.sl: Z virtualnimi orodji in jasno komunikacijo

options.en: Facilitate conversation to inspect and adapt the plan toward the Sprint Goal
Reassign the work to another Developer

why.en: The SM facilitates empiricism: inspect, then adapt. Scope can be renegotiated with the PO. Cancellation is only if the Sprint Goal itself becomes obsolete, and only by the PO.
why.sl: Scrum podpira daljino delo z uporabo virtualnih orodij za komunikacijo, sezname dela in pregledovanje. Ključna je jasna komunikacija in dogovor o delavniku.

q.en: The organization asks the Scrum Team to skip the Sprint Retrospective to save time. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Kaj se zgodi z neizdanim delom na koncu Sprinta?

options.en: Comply — saving time is a legitimate organizational concern
options.sl: Avtomatsko se pretvori v velik zadnji del

options.en: Coach the organization on why the Retrospective drives empirical improvement, and protect the event
options.sl: Se vrne v seznam izdelka za prioritizacijo

options.en: Combine the Retrospective with the Sprint Review to satisfy both ends
options.sl: Se morajo zaključiti med naslednjim Sprintom

options.en: Run a shorter Retrospective privately with just the Developers

why.en: Events are not optional. Skipping the Retrospective removes the formal opportunity to inspect and adapt how the team works — undermining continuous improvement.
why.sl: Neizdano delo se vrne v seznam izdelka in ga Product Owner ponovno prioritizira za prihodnje Sprinte. Ne prehaja avtomatsko v naslednji Sprint.

q.en: Developers disagree on how to implement a Product Backlog item. What should happen?
q.sl: Ali je mogoče imeti Scrum v organizaciji, ki ne sprejema sprememb?

options.en: The Scrum Master decides the technical approach
The Product Owner breaks the tie based on business value
The Developers, as self-managing professionals, resolve it together
Escalate to a senior architect outside the team

why.en: Self-managing teams decide who does what, when, and how. Internal technical disagreements are for the Developers to resolve together.
why.sl: Scrum zahteva kulturo, ki sprejema empiričnost, pregled in prilagoditev. V organizacijah, ki ne sprejmejo sprememb, je implementacija Scruma izziv.

q.en: Management demands a fixed-scope, fixed-date commitment for the next six months. How should the Scrum Master respond?
q.sl: Kaj so Scrum Artifacts?

options.en: Make the commitment on behalf of the team
Refuse to engage with management at all
options.sl: Product Backlog, Sprint Backlog in Inkrement

options.en: Help management understand empiricism and forecasts that evolve as learning occurs
Tell the Developers to work overtime

why.en: Complex product development is empirical. Forecasts based on evidence are honest; fixed long-term commitments across scope and date usually break under real-world complexity.
why.sl: Scrum Artifacts so Product Backlog, Sprint Backlog in Inkrement. To so ključni deli Scrum ogrodja, ki omogočajo preglednost in pregled.

q.en: During the Daily Scrum, Developers give status reports rather than inspecting progress toward the Sprint Goal. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Kakšen je namen Product Backlog-a?

options.en: Run the Daily Scrum themselves directly
Cancel the Daily Scrum until focus improves
options.sl: Seznam vseh zahtevkov in idej za izdelek

options.en: Coach the Developers on the event's purpose and refocus on progress toward the Sprint Goal
Require written reports instead of meetings

why.en: The Daily Scrum is for the Developers to inspect progress toward the Sprint Goal and adapt the Sprint Backlog. The SM coaches; they don't run it.
why.sl: Product Backlog je seznam vseh zahtevkov, lastnosti in izboljšav za izdelek. Vedno je dostopen in je edini vir informacij za spremembe.

q.en: The Developers haven't updated the Sprint Backlog in several days. This primarily harms:
q.sl: Ali je Product Backlog nikoli končan?

options.en: The Scrum Master's workload
Transparency of progress toward the Sprint Goal
options.sl: Ne, se razvija skozi čas in je dinamičen

options.en: The Product Owner's holiday plans
Nothing — the Sprint Backlog is informal

why.en: The Sprint Backlog makes progress toward the Sprint Goal transparent. Without updates, inspection is compromised and decisions suffer.
why.sl: Product Backlog je dinamičen in se nikoli ne zaključi. Razvija se s potrebami trga, povratnimi informacijami in učenjem. To je živosten dokument.

q.en: A new Developer joins the team mid-Sprint. What is the most Scrum-aligned approach?
q.sl: Kaj je najznačilnejši problem z upravljanjem seznama izdelka?

options.en: The Scrum Master assigns the new Developer to specific tasks
The Product Owner reassigns Sprint Backlog items to the new Developer
The Developers, as self-managing, decide together how to integrate the new member
The Sprint is cancelled to avoid mid-Sprint disruption

why.en: Self-managing Developers decide how to integrate changes in team composition. They adapt the plan as needed to pursue the Sprint Goal.
why.sl: Pogost izziv je, da seznam izdelka postane nepregleden, ker se na koncu naloži preveliko postavk brez jasne prioritete in vrednosti. Product Owner mora biti discipliniran pri prioritizaciji.

q.en: The Scrum Team consistently fails to meet the Definition of Done. The Scrum Master should first:
q.sl: Ali je potreben osebni Scrum Master za vsak tim?

options.en: Lower the Definition of Done standards
Replace team members who struggle
options.sl: Ne, Scrum Master lahko služi več timov

options.en: Coach the team to understand why the DoD isn't met and facilitate improvements
Escalate to executive leadership

why.en: The SM coaches the team to diagnose root causes — quality issues, unclear DoD, inadequate skills, environmental constraints — and facilitates improvement. Lowering the DoD creates technical debt.
why.sl: Scrum Master je lahko v partnerstvu med več timov. Vendar mora imeti dovolj časa, da učinkovito služi vsakemu timu.

q.en: A Scrum Team has used the same Definition of Done for a year without change. This suggests:
q.sl: Ali je mogoče imeti Scrum brez Product Ownerja?

options.en: A mature, stable team with strong performance
A potential issue — teams should expand their DoD as they mature and capabilities improve
options.sl: Ne, Product Owner je ključna vloga

options.en: Nothing in particular worth noting
The team is violating Scrum fundamentally
options.sl: Lahko ga zamenjamo s projektnim vodjem

why.en: As Scrum Teams mature, their DoD is expected to expand to include more stringent criteria for higher quality. Stagnation may signal missed improvement opportunities.
why.sl: Product Owner je obvezna vloga v Scrumu. Brez njega ni jasne prioritete in smeri za izdelek. Vloge se ne morejo preskakati.

q.en: During the Sprint Retrospective, the team identifies an important improvement. When should it be acted on?
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši cilj Sprintinga?

options.en: At the end of the next release cycle
As soon as possible — often in the very next Sprint
Only if the Product Owner approves in writing
Discussed but rarely acted on in practice

why.en: The most impactful improvement identified in the Retrospective is addressed as soon as possible — often in the upcoming Sprint's Sprint Backlog.
why.sl: Najpomembnejši cilj Sprintinga je dostaviti vrednost proizvodu in se naučiti ter prilagoditi. Količina dela je sekundarna ciljem in vrednosti.

q.en: A team wants to adopt Scrum but senior leadership does not understand the framework. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Ali se Scrum lahko uporablja izven IT industrije?

options.en: Tell the team to abandon Scrum adoption
Lead, train, and coach the organization in Scrum adoption and planning implementations
options.sl: Da, je applicable na veliko vsebin

options.en: Wait for a directive from executives
Quietly implement Scrum without leadership awareness or buy-in

why.en: Serving the organization includes leading and coaching Scrum adoption and helping stakeholders understand empirical product development.
why.sl: Scrum je mogoče uporabiti v marsikaterih industrijah - marketingu, gradnji, produkciji, raziskavah in drugo. Principi so univerzalni.

q.en: What is the Scrum Master's role during Scrum events?
q.sl: Kaj se zgodi, če Razvijalci ne dosežejo cilj Sprinta?

options.en: To lead and direct all discussions
To ensure events are positive, productive, and kept within the time-box
To make decisions for the team
options.sl: Se razgovara o vzrokih v retrospektivi in se prilagodi

options.en: To take minutes and distribute notes

why.en: The Scrum Master ensures that all Scrum events take place and are positive, productive, and kept within the time-box. The SM facilitates; the team does the work.
why.sl: Neuspelo doseganje cilj Sprinta je priložnost za učenje, ne kaznjenje. V retrospektivi se razgovara o vzrokih in se procesov prilagodi za prihodnost.

q.en: Which are true about multiple Scrum Teams working on the same product? (Select all that apply)
q.sl: Kako dolgo je mogoče imeti Scrum projekt?

options.en: They share one Product Goal
They share one Product Backlog
They share one Product Owner
Each team has its own Product Backlog
options.sl: Vsak tim ima svoj Seznam Izdelka

options.en: They share a consistent Definition of Done for the integrated Increment
options.sl: Delijo skladno Definicijo Končanega za integrirani Inkrement

why.en: Multiple teams on one product share: one Product Goal, one Product Backlog, one Product Owner, and a consistent Definition of Done (organizational standard or one created by the teams together).
why.sl: Projekt s Scrum je lahko dokler je potrebno. Scrum je aplikable na kratkoročne in dolgoročne projekte, začinjajoč s proizvodi.

q.en: Which of the following is NOT one of the five formal Scrum events?
q.sl: Kaj je največ pogrešna razlika med Scrumom in Waterfall modelom?

options.en: Sprint Planning
Daily Scrum
options.sl: Waterfall je linearen, Scrum je iterativen

options.en: Product Backlog Refinement
Sprint Review

why.en: The five events are Sprint, Sprint Planning, Daily Scrum, Sprint Review, and Sprint Retrospective. Product Backlog Refinement is an ongoing activity, not a formal event.
why.sl: Waterfall je linearen model, kjer se vsaka faza zaključi pred naslednjo. Scrum je iterativen model s kratkim ciklom (Sprinti) za povratne informacije in prilagoditev.

q.en: Scrum is founded on empiricism and lean thinking.
q.sl: Ali je Scrum primeren za projekte z nepredvidljivimi zahtevami?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. The Scrum Guide 2020 explicitly states: 'Scrum is founded on empiricism and lean thinking.'
why.sl: Scrum je idealen za projekte s spreminjavimi zahtevkami. Empiričnost in prilagodljiva narava omogoča obravnavo nepredvidljivosti.

q.en: If the Product Owner is unavailable for Sprint Planning, what is the most appropriate outcome?
q.sl: Kaj je Lean in kako se povezuje s Scrum?

options.en: Cancel the Sprint outright since the Product Owner cannot attend Planning
Promote a Developer or stakeholder to act as Product Owner for the Planning event
options.sl: Lean je metodologija, Scrum jo je vključuje

options.en: Sprint Planning cannot proceed effectively; the SM resolves the PO availability issue first
Have the Developers select items themselves and confirm with the PO afterward

why.en: The PO is essential to Sprint Planning — proposing value, clarifying PBIs, and shaping the Sprint Goal. The SM addresses the systemic issue that the PO isn't engaged.
why.sl: Lean je filozofija za zmanjšanje odpadkov. Scrum je ogrodja, ki vključuje leane principe. Skupaj omogočata optimizacijo procesov.

q.en: Two Developers routinely bypass the Definition of Done to deliver faster. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Kaj je Kanban in kako se razlikuje od Scruma?

options.en: Praise them for the speed
Coach the team on quality, transparency, and the DoD
options.sl: Kanban je vizualni sistem, Scrum je ogrodja s Sprinti

options.en: Report them to management
Remove them from the team

why.en: The SM coaches the team on the value of the DoD. Skipping it creates hidden technical debt and erodes long-term value. The team is accountable for instilling quality.
why.sl: Kanban je vizualni sistem za upravljanje pretoka dela, Scrum je ogrodja s časovnimi okviri (Sprinti). Oba sta iterativna pristopa, a z različnimi pristopi.

q.en: Work that does not meet the Definition of Done can be released as long as the Product Owner approves.
q.sl: Ali je mogoče kombinirati Scrum in Kanban?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. Work that does not meet the DoD cannot be released or considered part of the Increment. It is returned to the Product Backlog for future consideration.
why.sl: Da, Scrum in Kanban je mogoče kombinirati. Hibridni pristopi, kot je Scrumban, nudijo prednosti obeh pristopov.

q.en: A stakeholder complains directly to the Developers that the product is 'behind schedule.' The most Scrum-aligned response is:
q.sl: Kaj bi bila vaša svetovanja za organizacijo, ki je novo uvedla Scrum?

options.en: The Developers commit to working weekends to catch up
The Developers direct the stakeholder to the Product Owner and coach on empirical engagement
options.sl: Počasi se prilagajte, vadite timov in se učite iz praxis

options.en: The Scrum Master shields the team by refusing engagement
The Developers change the Sprint Backlog to please the stakeholder

why.en: Stakeholder engagement on value, scope, and timing goes through the Product Owner. The SM helps both sides understand empirical progress and stakeholder involvement at the Sprint Review.
why.sl: Najboljši pristop je počasi in redno vpeljevati Scrum, z usposabljanjem in podporo. Kultura se ne spremeni čez noč. Povratne informacije in učenje sta ključna za uspešno implementacijo.

q.en: The Product Owner is accountable for developing and communicating what?
q.sl: Za kaj je Product Owner odgovoren in jo mora razvijati ter sporočati?

options.en: The Definition of Done
The Product Goal and the Product Backlog
options.sl: Za Cilj izdelka in produktni seznam

options.en: The Sprint plan
The team's velocity metrics

why.en: The Product Owner is accountable for developing and communicating the Product Goal and for effective Product Backlog management. The other items are not PO accountabilities.
why.sl: Product Owner je odgovoren za razvijanje in sporočanje Cilja izdelka ter za učinkovito upravljanje produktnega seznama. Ostale točke niso odgovornosti Product Ownerja.

q.en: The Product Owner is accountable for the technical quality of the product.
q.sl: Kaj Product Owner ne sme početi med Sprintom?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. The Developers are accountable for quality through instilling it via the Definition of Done. The Product Owner focuses on value and ordering.
why.sl: Med Sprintom ne smemo spremeniti cilja Sprinta, ker bi to ogrožalo doseganje cilja. Drugih aktivnosti Product Owner lahko opravlja med Sprintom.

q.en: A Developer becomes the Scrum Master for the same team. What is primarily at risk?
q.sl: Kakšna je vloga Scrum Mastera pri izpopolnjevanju produktnega seznama?

options.en: The team's velocity, as the SM now has fewer hours for Scrum work
options.sl: Odgovoren je za vsebino in prioritete elementov

options.en: The Scrum Master's ability to serve as an impartial coach and change agent
The project timeline, since the SM cannot forecast as accurately as before
options.sl: Zagotavlja, da so Razvijalci vključeni in imajo razumevanje elementov

options.en: The Definition of Done, which becomes inconsistent across team members
options.sl: Trdi, da Product Owner pravilno razvrsti elemente

why.en: While one person can hold multiple roles, combining Developer and SM creates a conflict of interest. The SM must serve and coach the team objectively, which is harder when also doing development work.
why.sl: Scrum Master nima direktne odgovornosti za vsebino ali prioritete, vendar zagotavlja, da so Razvijalci v procesu vključeni in da dosegajo skupno razumevanje.

q.en: The Scrum Master's accountability for team effectiveness means:
q.sl: Kaj je glavna razlika med Sprintom in drugim razvojnim pristopom?

options.en: Assigning work to meet velocity targets
options.sl: Sprinti so krajši od drugih oblik razvojnih ciklov

options.en: Removing impediments and coaching the team on self-management and Scrum practices
options.sl: Sprinti imajo fiksno časovno omejitev in cilj

options.en: Collecting metrics to report to management
Making architectural decisions

why.en: Scrum Master effectiveness is about removing impediments, coaching self-management and cross-functionality, and helping the team embrace empiricism.
why.sl: Ključna značilnost Sprinta je njegova fiksna časovna omejitev (največkrat 2 tedna) in jasno definiran cilj Sprinta, ki vodi razvojne napore tima.

q.en: When a critical bug is discovered mid-Sprint, who decides whether to pull it into the current Sprint?
q.sl: Kateri je prvi korak pri planiranju Sprinta?

options.en: The Scrum Master
The Developers and Product Owner together
options.sl: Scrum tim se fokusira na cilj Sprinta

options.en: The Product Owner unilaterally
Management

why.en: The Product Owner prioritizes and can propose adding it, but the Developers decide what they can fit while protecting the Sprint Goal. It's a collaborative decision.
why.sl: Prvi korak je, da se Scrum tim osredotoči na cilj Sprinta in kaj si želi doseči v tem Sprintu, ne na posamezne elemente ali kapaciteto.

q.en: Which of the following is a Scrum Master accountability?
q.sl: Koliko časa je dovoljeno porabiti na planiranju Sprinta za 2-tedenski Sprint?

options.en: Writing user stories
Estimating Product Backlog items
Coaching the organization on Scrum and removing organizational impediments
Signing off on Increments
options.sl: Ni omejitve, koliko časa je potrebnega

why.en: The SM serves the organization by coaching it on Scrum adoption, identifying and helping remove systemic impediments, and advising implementations.
why.sl: Planiranje Sprinta za 2-tedenski Sprint ima vremensko omejitev 4 ur. Trajanje je sorazmerno s trajanjem Sprinta.

q.en: If the Developers and Product Owner cannot agree on Sprint scope, the Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Kaj se zgodi, če Razvijalci ne dosežejo cilja Sprinta?

options.en: Make the decision to break the tie
Facilitate a conversation so both sides understand each other and reach agreement
options.sl: Spremembe se prenesejo na naslednji Sprint

options.en: Let the team default to lower scope
options.sl: Sprint se zaključi kot načrtovano in se spremembe prenesejo na seznam dela

options.en: Escalate to management

why.en: The SM facilitates, not directs. They help the team inspect the situation and adapt collaboratively.
why.sl: Sprint se zaključi kot načrtovano v predvideni časovni okvir, tudi če cilj ni dosežen. Neizvedeni elementi ostanejo v produktnem seznamu za nadaljnjo obdelavo.

q.en: The Scrum Master notices that Product Backlog items are unclear and not ordered well. What should the SM do?
q.sl: Kaj je glavni cilj Dnevnega Scruma?

options.en: Reorder the backlog themselves
Coach the Product Owner on effective Product Backlog management
options.sl: Usklajiti akcije in rešiti blokade tima

options.en: Tell the Developers to ignore unclear items
Cancel the next Sprint

why.en: The SM serves the PO by coaching on effective practices: clear item description, appropriate ordering, and visibility of the backlog.
why.sl: Dnevni Scrum je fokusiran na usklajevanje in pregled napredka glede na cilj Sprinta ter na identificiranje in reševanje ovir, ki bi lahko vplivale na doseganje cilja.

q.en: The Developers are accountable for holding each other accountable as professionals.
q.sl: Kdo mora biti navzoč na Dnevnem Screumu?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. This is explicit in the Scrum Guide. Developers are self-managing and hold themselves and each other accountable for creating quality work.
why.sl: Dnevni Scrum je dogodek za Razvijalce. Product Owner in Scrum Master imata vlogo svetovalca in spremljatelja, vendar lahko tudi udeleženci, če je to koristno za tim.

q.en: A Scrum Team member lacks the skills needed for a critical Sprint task. Who is primarily accountable for addressing this gap?
q.sl: Koliko časa lahko traja Dnevni Scrum za 2-tedenski Sprint?

options.en: The Product Owner
The Scrum Master should coach and help remove the impediment
The specific Developer
Management training department

why.en: The SM removes impediments to the team's effectiveness, including skill gaps. This may mean coaching, arranging pairing, finding resources, or other actions.
why.sl: Dnevni Scrum je časovno omejen na 15 minut za 1-mesečni (4-tedenski) Sprint. Za krajše Sprinte je časovna omejitev sorazmerno krajša.

q.en: Sprint Planning Topic One focuses on answering which question?
q.sl: Kaj je Pregled Sprinta?

options.en: Who will do what?
How will the work be done?
options.sl: Javna predstavitev izvedenega Inkrementа in sprejemanja povratnih informacij

options.en: Why is this Sprint valuable?
When will we release?

why.en: The Scrum Guide identifies three topics in Sprint Planning. Topic One: 'Why is this Sprint valuable?' The PO proposes how the product could increase value.
why.sl: Pregled Sprinta je dogodek, v katerem Scrum tim predstavi izvedeni Inkrement in zbira povratne informacije od deležnikov za izboljšanje izdelka.

q.en: Sprint Planning Topic Two focuses on answering which question?
q.sl: Koliko časa je predvideno za Pregled Sprinta v 2-tedenskem Sprintu?

options.en: Why is this Sprint valuable?
What can be Done this Sprint and how will the work be done?
When will the work be released?
Who is the Product Owner?

why.en: Topic Two: 'What can be Done this Sprint and how will the work be done?' The Developers plan the work needed to achieve the Sprint Goal.
why.sl: Pregled Sprinta za 2-tedenski Sprint je časovno omejen na največ 2 uri. Trajanje je sorazmerno s trajanjem Sprinta.

q.en: If a one-week Sprint is used, what is the typical maximum time-box for Sprint Planning?
q.sl: Kaj je glavna razlika med Pregledом Sprinta in Retrospektivo Sprinta?

options.en: 2 hours
options.sl: Pregled je zunanja orientacija, Retrospektiva je notranja

options.en: 4 hours
options.sl: Pregled je za Razvijalce, Retrospektiva za Product Ownerja

options.en: 8 hours
options.sl: Oba sta enaka, le različna imena

options.en: No limit applies to short Sprints
options.sl: Pregled je za oceno kakovosti, Retrospektiva za planiranje

why.en: Sprint Planning is time-boxed to eight hours for a one-month Sprint. For shorter Sprints, the event is proportionally shorter. A one-week Sprint would typically have Planning around two hours or less.
why.sl: Pregled Sprinta je fokusiran na kaj je bilo izvedeno (produkt) in povratne informacije, Retrospektiva pa se osredotoči na kako je bilo delo izvedeno (proces in izboljšave).

q.en: What is the single most important purpose of the Sprint Review?
q.sl: Kaj je Retrospektiva Sprinta?

options.en: To collect feedback from the Product Owner
options.sl: Sestanka za oceno dela vsakega člana

options.en: To present a status report to management
options.sl: Sestanka, v kateri se tim osredotoči na izboljšave v procesu in delovanju tima

options.en: To inspect the Increment with stakeholders and adapt the Product Backlog
To celebrate the team's effort
options.sl: Sestanka za preverjanje ustreznosti Product Ownerja

why.en: The Sprint Review is a working session where the Scrum Team and stakeholders collaborate to inspect the Increment and adapt the Product Backlog based on what was learned.
why.sl: Retrospektiva Sprinta je dogodek, v katerem se Scrum tim osredotoči na svoje delo, proces in medsebojne odnose ter identificira izboljšave za naslednji Sprint.

q.en: The Sprint Review includes a working demo or presentation of the Increment.
q.sl: Koliko časa je predvideno za Retrospektivo Sprinta v 2-tedenskem Sprintu?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. The Scrum Team presents the work that is Done (the Increment) and discusses what was accomplished and what challenges were encountered.
why.sl: Retrospektiva Sprinta za 2-tedenski Sprint je časovno omejena na največ 1,5 ure. Trajanje je sorazmerno s trajanjem Sprinta.

q.en: If multiple Scrum Teams are using two-week Sprints, what is the maximum duration for their combined Sprint Reviews?
q.sl: Kaj je Definicija Končanega?

options.en: 4 hours total
options.sl: Opis kako je bil kod napisan

options.en: Each team has a 4-hour review, so 8+ hours combined
options.sl: Jasna predstava kaj pomeni 'končan' za izdelek ali funkcionalnost

options.en: 2 hours per team; combined depends on number of teams
options.sl: Lista stvari ki jih mora narediti Product Owner

options.en: The Scrum Guide does not address this scenario

why.en: The Scrum Guide specifies that Sprint Review is time-boxed to a maximum of four hours for a one-month Sprint. Each team conducting a two-week Sprint would have a shorter review, but there is no prescribed combined limit.
why.sl: Definicija Končanega je eksplicitna, skupna razumevanje kaj pomeni da je delo 'končano' – vključuje standarde za kakovost, testiranje, dokumentacijo in drugo.

q.en: During the Daily Scrum, what happens if a Scrum Team completes their discussion before 15 minutes?
q.sl: Kdo odgovarja za Definicijo Končanega?

options.en: They must wait until 15 minutes have passed
They end the Daily Scrum early
They add more agenda items
They postpone it to the next day

why.en: The Daily Scrum is time-boxed to 15 minutes maximum, not a minimum. If the Developers finish inspecting progress and planning their day in less time, the Daily Scrum ends early.
why.sl: Organizacija določi minimalno Definicijo Končanega, Scrum tim pa jo lahko razširi in ji je skladen. Skupna je odgovornost.

q.en: The Daily Scrum is held at the same time and place each day primarily to:
q.sl: Kaj je Inkrement?

options.en: Reduce the total time spent in meetings
Reduce complexity and ensure consistency
options.sl: Vsota vseh elementov produktnega seznama, ki so bili izvedeni med Sprintom

options.en: Impress stakeholders with discipline
Give the Scrum Master a structured role

why.en: Holding it at the same time and place each day reduces complexity and helps the Developers build a sustainable habit of daily inspection and adaptation.
why.sl: Inkrement je vsota vseh produktnih elementov, ki so izpolnili Definicijo Končanega in so izvedeni v Sprintu. Predstavlja izdelan napredek v proizvodu.

q.en: Who is responsible for running the Daily Scrum event?
q.sl: Mora biti Inkrement funkcionalen na koncu Sprinta?

options.en: The Scrum Master directs the discussion
options.sl: Ne, le priredljene kode je dovolj

options.en: The Product Owner sets the agenda
The Developers are responsible for their own Daily Scrum
options.sl: Ja, Inkrement mora biti potencialno sproščljiva verzija

options.en: A rotating Developer leads it
options.sl: Le če ga Product Owner odobri

why.en: The Daily Scrum is owned by the Developers. They run it and determine how they conduct it. The SM ensures it happens and stays within the time-box, but does not direct it.
why.sl: Inkrement mora biti potencialno sproščljiva verzija, kar pomeni da mora biti funkcionален, testiran in spoštovati Definicijo Končanega.

q.en: For a two-week Sprint, the maximum time-box for the Sprint Retrospective is:
q.sl: Kaj je produktni seznam?

options.en: 1.5 hours
2 hours
options.sl: Uređena lista zahtev, idej, izboljšav in popravkov za proizvod

options.en: 3 hours
There is no maximum for shorter Sprints

why.en: Sprint Retrospective is time-boxed to three hours for a one-month Sprint. For a two-week Sprint, it would be scaled proportionally — approximately 1.5 hours.
why.sl: Produktni seznam je dinamična, prednostna lista vsega kar je mogoče in koristno v izdelku. Vključuje nove zahteve, izboljšave, popravke in druge postavke.

q.en: The Sprint Review and the Sprint Retrospective can be combined into one event to save time.
q.sl: Kaj je seznam dela Sprinta?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. The Sprint Review (inspect the Increment with stakeholders) and the Sprint Retrospective (inspect the team's process) serve different purposes and should not be combined.
why.sl: Seznam dela Sprinta je razčlenitni plan Razvijalcev za doseganje cilja Sprinta. Sestoji iz elementov produktnega seznama in načrta kako jih izvesti.

q.en: What is the primary purpose of the Sprint as a time-boxed event?
q.sl: Kateri je običajen trajanski čas Sprinta v Scrum?

options.en: To measure team velocity
To release the product every month
To create a rhythm for planning, delivery, and inspection in a predictable cadence
To satisfy management reporting requirements

why.en: The Sprint creates a regular, predictable rhythm for the team to plan, work, inspect, and adapt. This enables sustainable pace and reduces complexity.
why.sl: Scrum Guide priporoča Sprinte s trajanjem 1 meseca ali manj. Najpogosteje se uporabljajo 2-tedenski Sprinti, vendar je priporočeno, da se trajanje izbere glede na specifično situacijo.

q.en: A Scrum Team plans a two-week Sprint. When does the next Sprint begin?
q.sl: Ali je mogoče spremeniti trajanje Sprinta med letom?

options.en: After a one-week planning period
options.sl: Ne, trajanje mora biti fiksno celo leto

options.en: Immediately when the current Sprint ends
options.sl: Ja, toda spremembe bi morale biti redke in premišljene

options.en: After management approves the previous Increment
Only after a release to production

why.en: A new Sprint starts immediately after the previous one ends. There is no gap between Sprints. The rhythm is continuous.
why.sl: Čeprav je skladnost trajanja Sprinta koristna, je mogoče spremeniti trajanje, vendar bi to moralo biti redko in premišljeno, da ne bi motilo ritma tima.

q.en: Which Scrum event directly addresses continuous improvement?
q.sl: Kaj je empiričnost v Scrum?

options.en: Sprint Planning
Daily Scrum
options.sl: Proces, ki se bazira na opažanja, poskusu in povratnih informacijah

options.en: Sprint Review
Sprint Retrospective

why.en: The Sprint Retrospective is where the team inspects itself and identifies ways to improve regarding people, interactions, processes, tools, and the Definition of Done.
why.sl: Empiričnost je ključna vrednost v Scrum, ki se bazira na treh stebrih: Preglednost, Pregled in Prilagoditev. Delo je vodeno s povratnimi informacijami in učenjem.

q.en: During the Sprint Review, the stakeholder says the Increment doesn't meet expectations. What is the appropriate action?
q.sl: Kateri so trije stebri empiričnosti v Scrum?

options.en: The Developers immediately rework it to fix the issue
The feedback is discussed and informs future Product Backlog ordering and refinement
The Product Owner must cancel the Sprint
The item is marked as Done anyway

why.en: The Sprint Review is a working session for collaboration and learning. Stakeholder feedback informs product direction. The item is already Done; future work may adjust based on feedback.
why.sl: Tri stebri empiričnosti v Scrum so: Preglednost (vsa relevantna informacija je dostopna), Pregled (redna merjenja napredka) in Prilagoditev (korektivni ukrepi).

q.en: A Scrum Team's Daily Scrum conversations repeatedly run over time and get pulled into detailed problem-solving. What should the Scrum Master do?
q.sl: Kaj je preglednost v kontekstu Scrum?

options.en: Cancel the Daily Scrum to save time across the team's Sprints going forward
Coach the team that the Daily Scrum is for inspection and planning, not deep problem-solving
options.sl: Dostopnost informacij o delu, procesu in statusu

options.en: Require shorter status updates from each Developer to stay within the time-box
Extend the Daily Scrum time-box to 30 minutes to fit the deeper conversations

why.en: The Daily Scrum is a 15-minute time-boxed inspection. Detailed problem-solving should happen in separate discussions outside the Daily Scrum. The SM coaches the team on this distinction.
why.sl: Preglednost pomeni, da so relevantne informacije o delu, stanju produktnega seznama, seznama dela Sprinta in Inkrementа dostopne vsem deležnikom.

q.en: What does the Product Backlog primarily represent?
q.sl: Kaj je pregled v kontekstu Scrum?

options.en: A list of work completed in past Sprints
An emergent, ordered list of work needed to improve the product toward the Product Goal
options.sl: Redna merjenja in ocena napredka glede na cilj

options.en: The tasks assigned to individual Developers
options.sl: Zbiranje povratnih informacij samo na koncu leta

options.en: A contract with customers

why.en: The Product Backlog is an emergent, ordered list of what is needed to improve the product. It is the single source of work for the Scrum Team and evolves over time.
why.sl: Pregled je redna ocena napredka in stanja, tipično med Dnevnim Scrumom, Pregledом Sprinta in Retrospektivo Sprinta, kar omogoča prilagoditve.

q.en: The Product Backlog is static; once items are added, their order rarely changes.
q.sl: Kaj je prilagoditev v kontekstu Scrum?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. The Product Backlog is emergent and dynamic. The Product Owner continuously refines, reorders, and adds/removes items based on feedback and learning.
why.sl: Prilagoditev je sprejemanje korektivnih ali preprečevalnih ukrepov na podlagi spoznanj, pridobljenih med pregledom. To je osnova za kontinuirano izboljšavo.

q.en: Who can modify the Sprint Backlog during a Sprint?
q.sl: Katere pet vrednosti se spoštuje v Scrum?

options.en: Only the Product Owner
Only the Scrum Master
The Developers, as they learn and work toward the Sprint Goal
No one — it is locked once the Sprint begins

why.en: The Sprint Backlog is owned and managed by the Developers. They update it continuously as work progresses and more is learned, always aiming for the Sprint Goal.
why.sl: Pet vrednosti Scrum so: Predanost (do cilja in tima), Osredotočenost (na cilj Sprinta), Odprtost (do izzivov in povratnih informacij), Spoštovanje (sebe in drugih) in Pogum (da se kaj sprosi in naredi).

q.en: An Increment is best described as:
q.sl: Kaj Predanost v Scrum pomeni?

options.en: A partial, unfinished piece of work
A concrete step toward the Product Goal that is usable and meets the Definition of Done
options.sl: Zavezanost doseganju cilja Sprinta in kakovosti

options.en: Everything the team did in a Sprint, finished or not
A release to production

why.en: An Increment is a concrete, fully verified stepping stone toward the Product Goal. It must meet the Definition of Done and can be demonstrated at the Sprint Review.
why.sl: Predanost pomeni zavezanost doseganju cilja Sprinta in vsem ciljem tima ter kakovosti izvedenega Inkrementа, tudi kljub izzivom.

q.en: If an organization has no existing Definition of Done, who creates one?
q.sl: Kaj Osredotočenost v Scrum pomeni?

options.en: The Scrum Master creates it and enforces it
The Product Owner defines it
options.sl: Koncentracija na cilj Sprinta in izbrane prioritete

options.en: The Scrum Team creates one appropriate for their product
Upper management defines it for all teams
options.sl: Preprečevanje tima da dela drugo delo

why.en: If the organization has no Definition of Done standard, the Scrum Team creates one appropriate for the product they are building.
why.sl: Osredotočenost pomeni, da se Scrum tim osredotoči na cilj Sprinta in da svojega napora usmerja v doseganje tega cilja, ne v druge konkurenčne ali odbijave.

q.en: Why is transparency of the Product Backlog critical?
q.sl: Kaj Odprtost v Scrum pomeni?

options.en: It helps the Scrum Master manage the team
It allows everyone to understand what work is prioritized and why, enabling alignment and reducing surprises
options.sl: Iskrenost o delu, izzivima in ovirami

options.en: It guarantees faster delivery
It eliminates the need for the Sprint Review

why.en: Transparency of the Product Backlog enables the Developers, stakeholders, and organization to understand what is planned, why, and in what order. It creates a shared understanding.
why.sl: Odprtost pomeni, da je Scrum tim iskren o napredku, izzivima in ovirami ter da je odprt za povratne informacije in nove ideje ter jih sprejema.

q.en: The Definition of Done can be different for different Product Backlog items within the same Scrum Team.
q.sl: Kaj Spoštovanje v Scrum pomeni?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. The Definition of Done is a shared standard that applies to all Product Backlog items. It ensures consistency and transparency.
why.sl: Spoštovanje pomeni, da se članom tima prizna njihova vrednost, sposobnosti in enakopravnost ter da se spoštujejo njihove različne perspektive in pristopi.

q.en: Which of the following is NOT a part of the Sprint Backlog?
q.sl: Kaj Pogum v Scrum pomeni?

options.en: The Sprint Goal
Selected Product Backlog items
options.sl: Želja, da se kaj sprosi, da se kaj naučimo in da se spoprimemo z izzibi

options.en: The actionable plan for delivering the Increment
A list of all completed items from prior Sprints

why.en: The Sprint Backlog consists of the Sprint Goal, the Product Backlog items selected for this Sprint, and the action plan. Prior Sprints' work is not part of the current Sprint Backlog.
why.sl: Pogum pomeni, da člani tima imajo pogum, da se kaj sprosi, da se kaj naučijo, da sprejemajo izzive in da poskusijo nove stvari brez strahu od neuspeha.

q.en: The Sprint Goal is primarily committed to by:
q.sl: Katere so odgovornosti Product Ownerja?

options.en: The Product Owner
The Scrum Master
options.sl: Razvijanje in komuniciranje Cilja izdelka ter upravljanje produktnega seznama

options.en: The Developers
The stakeholders

why.en: The Developers commit to the Sprint Goal. They created it in Sprint Planning with the Product Owner and they are accountable for achieving it.
why.sl: Product Owner je odgovoren za razvijanje in sporočanje Cilja izdelka ter za učinkovito upravljanje produktnega seznama, vključno s prioritetami in vidljivostjo.

q.en: If the Developers realize mid-Sprint that the Sprint Goal is unachievable due to unexpected complexity, they should:
q.sl: Katere so odgovornosti Scrum Mastera?

options.en: Work overtime and weekends as a team to still achieve the original Sprint Goal
options.sl: Upravljanje članov tima in njihove plače

options.en: Reduce quality on selected items to meet the originally committed Sprint scope
options.sl: Spremljanje in vodenje tima k Scrum procesom in vrednostim

options.en: Collaborate with the Product Owner to renegotiate scope while protecting the Sprint Goal where possible
Recommend the Product Owner cancel the Sprint to start a fresh one immediately

why.en: The Sprint Goal can be protected even as scope adjusts. The Developers work with the PO to descope lower-priority items while keeping the core Sprint Goal intact.
why.sl: Scrum Master je odgovoren za omogočanje Scrum Tima in organizacije, da razumejo in živijo Scrum vrednosti ter procese, in da se odpravi ovire.

q.en: The Product Goal serves as a commitment for which artifact?
q.sl: Katere so odgovornosti Razvijalcev?

options.en: The Sprint Backlog
options.sl: Pisanje kode in samo pisanje kode

options.en: The Increment
options.sl: Načrtovanje, razvoj, testiranje in distribucija Inkrementа

options.en: The Product Backlog
options.sl: Opravljanje samo nalog, ki jih je naročil Product Owner

options.en: The Definition of Done

why.en: The Product Goal is the commitment for the Product Backlog. It describes the future state the team is working toward over multiple Sprints.
why.sl: Razvijalci so odgovorni za ustvarjanje Inkrementа — to vključuje odkrivanje zahtev, načrtovanje, razvoj, testiranje in drugih dejavnosti potrebnih za doseganje cilja.

q.en: The Definition of Done is a commitment made by the Developers to quality standards.
q.sl: Ali je mogoče, da je oseba hkrati Product Owner in razvijalec?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. The Definition of Done is the commitment for the Increment. It ensures that when an item is marked Done, it truly meets the team's quality and completeness standards.
why.sl: Tehnično je mogoče, vendar je to pogosto problematično, ker lahko pride do interesnih konfliktov. Ordinalno je da so vloge jasno ločene, čeprav manjši timi mogu imeti kombinacije.
