q.en: The Developers want to refactor significant portions of the codebase mid-Sprint, which threatens the Sprint Goal. What should happen?
q.sl: Kaj Scrum tim ne sme početi?

options.en: They refactor without discussion to improve quality
The Scrum Master forbids it
The team discusses the risk, decides together whether refactoring aligns with the Sprint Goal, and only proceeds if it does
The Product Owner assigns the refactoring to a different Sprint

why.en: Self-managing Developers make technical decisions together. Refactoring mid-Sprint is legitimate if it serves the Sprint Goal and the team agrees it is the right call.
why.sl: Scrum tim mora sledi časovnim omejitvam in procesom, vendar ima avtonomijo v kako izvede delo. Nima oblika strogega nadzora s strani management.

q.en: The Scrum Master notices that backlog refinement is not happening regularly. What is the most appropriate action?
q.sl: Ali je tim avtonomni pri odločanju kako je njegov cilj doseči?

options.en: Shift refinement to a formal scheduled event
options.sl: Ne, ali mora biti rečeno kaj delati

options.en: Coach the Product Owner and team on the importance of continuous refinement to keep items ready for Sprint Planning
options.sl: Da, tim je avtonomni pri kako dosego cilj, ne pri čem je cilj

options.en: Cancel the next Sprint until refinement is complete
options.sl: Da, ampak samo v prvem Sprintu

options.en: Take over refinement personally
options.sl: Ne, ker mora biti odobren s strani menedžmenta

why.en: Refinement is an ongoing activity (not a formal event). The SM coaches the team on best practices for continuous refinement so items are ready for selection.
why.sl: Da, Scrum tim ima avtonomijo pri odločanju kako bo dosegel cilj Sprinta. Product Owner določa kaj, tim pa ima samoodločnost pri kako.

q.en: Which statement best describes accountability within a Scrum Team?
q.sl: Kaj se zgodi, če Element produktnega seznama ni pravilno izpopolnjen?

options.en: The Scrum Master is accountable for team performance
options.sl: Najprej ne more biti izbran za Sprint

options.en: The Product Owner is accountable for completion of Sprint goals
The whole Scrum Team is accountable for creating a valuable, useful Increment every Sprint
Individual Developers are accountable for their assigned tasks

why.en: The Scrum Guide 2020 states that the whole Scrum Team is accountable for creating a valuable, useful Increment every Sprint. This is collective accountability, not distributed.
why.sl: Element, ki ni pravilno izpopolnjen (nima jasne definicije, kriterijev sprejetja) ne bi smel biti izbran za Sprint. Izpopolnjevanje je nujno pred izbor.

q.en: A Scrum Team must have at least one member who is a project manager.
q.sl: Kdo je odgovoren za rangiranje prioritet elementov produktnega seznama?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. Scrum defines the Product Owner, Developers, and Scrum Master — not a project manager. If an organization has PMs, they work outside the Scrum Team or leave the role to fulfill a Scrum role.
why.sl: Product Owner je odgovoren za rangiranje in prioritizacijo elementov produktnega seznama. To je neposredna odgovornost Product Ownerja.

q.en: A Scrum Team of 12 people should:
q.sl: Kaj je glavna vloga Product Ownerja pri planiranju Sprinta?

options.en: Divide into sub-teams with separate Product Backlogs
options.sl: Odločiti se kaj bo narediti Razvijalci

options.en: Restructure into multiple Scrum Teams sharing the same Product Goal and Product Backlog
options.sl: Predstaviti in razložiti elemente ter odgovarjaiti na vprašanja

options.en: Add another Scrum Master to manage half the team
Remain as one team if members prefer it

why.en: Scrum Teams are typically 10 or fewer. If a team exceeds this, they should reorganize into multiple cohesive Scrum Teams sharing the same Product Goal and Product Backlog.
why.sl: Pri planiranju Sprinta je Product Ownerja vloga predstaviti elemente, razložiti prioritete in biti dostopen za vprašanja, toda Razvijalci sami odločijo kaj je izvedljivo.

q.en: The Product Owner participates in the Daily Scrum primarily to:
q.sl: Ali je mogoče, da Product Owner dela spremembe v produktnem sezname med Sprintom?

options.en: Report daily metrics to management
Only if they are actively working on a Sprint Backlog item as a Developer
options.sl: Da, ker je to njihova odgovornost

options.en: Clarify requirements for the team
options.sl: Da, toda spremembe ne vplivajo na trenutni Sprint

options.en: Approve each task before Developers begin
options.sl: Samo v nujnih primerih s privolitvijo Scrum Mastera

why.en: The Daily Scrum is for the Developers. The PO or SM participates as Developers only if actively working on Sprint Backlog items. They don't attend to manage or approve.
why.sl: Da, Product Owner je lahko spremeniti produktni seznam med Sprintom, toda nove spremembe ne bodo vplivale na trenutni Sprint razen če Razvijalci niso tako fokusirani.

q.en: Which of the following are true about the Scrum Team structure? (Select all that apply)
q.sl: Kaj storiti, če Razvijalci med Sprintom odkrijejo da je cilj Sprinta nemogoč?

options.en: There are no sub-teams or hierarchies within a Scrum Team
options.sl: V Scrum timu ni podtimov ali hierarhij

options.en: The team is self-managing in who does what, when, and how
options.sl: Tim je samovlasten pri tem, kaj, kdaj in kako se naredi

options.en: The team shares one Product Goal
Members must stay with the same team indefinitely
options.sl: Člani morajo ostati v istem timu nedoločen čas

options.en: The team has all skills needed to create value each Sprint without relying on others outside the team
options.sl: Tim ima vse potrebne veščine za ustvarjanje vrednosti v vsakem Sprintu brez zanašanja na druge zunaj tima

why.en: A Scrum Team is one cohesive unit with no sub-teams or hierarchies, self-managing, focused on one Product Goal, and cross-functional. Members may transition between teams; tenure is not fixed.
why.sl: Razvijalci morajo takoj javiti Product Ownerju, če je cilj nemogoč. Skupaj lahko sprejemajo odločitve glede na novi podatke, ampak cilj Sprinta se ne spremeni temveč se le prilagodi seznam dela.

q.en: When a Scrum Team member consistently fails to meet commitments, the Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Ali je mogoče, da Product Owner zavrne Inkrement?

options.en: Publicly criticize them in the next Daily Scrum
Coach the individual and the team on self-management, transparency, and accountability
options.sl: Da, toda samo če ne dosega Definicije Končanega

options.en: Recommend their removal from the team
options.sl: Da, toda samo če ima poslovne razloge

options.en: Stop including them in Sprint Planning
options.sl: Ne, ker je Razvijalci ga že testirali

why.en: The SM serves by coaching the team on self-management and holding each other accountable. Removing someone or excluding them from planning bypasses the coaching opportunity.
why.sl: Da, Product Owner lahko zavrne Inkrement, toda samo če ne dosega Definicije Končanega ali če ne dosega sprejemljivih kriterijev. To mora biti jasno definirano vnaprej.

q.en: A Scrum Team may assign different Sprint Goals to different members based on their specialties.
q.sl: Kaj je Cilj izdelka?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. The Sprint Goal is one single objective for the entire Scrum Team. It creates coherence and focus. The team works together toward it, not toward individual goals.
why.sl: Cilj izdelka je dolgoročna vrednota in motiv, ki ga Product Owner želi doseči ali obnoviti. To je osnova za strategijo in prioritete produktnega seznama.

q.en: What does it mean for a Scrum Team to be 'focused'?
q.sl: Kako Cilj izdelka vpliva na produktni seznam?

options.en: Members concentrate intensely without breaks
The team works on one Product Goal at a time, committed to the Sprint Goal
options.sl: To je osnova za prioritiziranje elementov v produktnem seznamu

options.en: Developers focus only on coding, PO on requirements, SM on facilitation
The team ignores interruptions entirely

why.en: Focus in Scrum means commitment to one Product Goal and one Sprint Goal at a time. This creates clarity and coherence — not fragmented work across competing objectives.
why.sl: Cilj izdelka je osnova za razvijanje produktnega seznama in njegove prioritete. Product Owner mora zagotoviti, da elementi doprispevajo doseganju Cilja izdelka.

q.en: Which Scrum Value is most directly related to accepting feedback and adjusting plans as new information emerges?
q.sl: Ali je mogoče, da Cilj izdelka spremenimo med razvojem?

options.en: Commitment
options.sl: Ne, mora biti fiksna od začetka

options.en: Respect
options.sl: Da, toda spremembe bi bile redke in premišljene

options.en: Openness
Focus

why.en: Openness to new information and perspectives enables inspection and adaptation. Empiricism depends on the willingness to hear feedback and adjust course.
why.sl: Da, Cilj izdelka se lahko prilagaja, toda to bi bilo redko in zahtevalo bi razumevanje vpliva na strategijo, prioritete in Sprinte.

q.en: A Scrum Team discovers a critical quality issue in production after the Sprint Review. Which value is most important to embody in responding?
q.sl: Kaj je osnovna formula za Scrum ekosistem?

options.en: Focus — ignore the problem and stay on the Sprint plan
Courage — raise the issue transparently and address it, even if it disrupts the plan
Commitment — promise to fix it later
Respect — let management decide the response

why.en: Courage paired with openness means the team transparently raises issues and acts decisively, even when it's uncomfortable. Hiding problems or deferring defeats empiricism.
why.sl: Scrum ima tri glavne komponente: Rolle (Product Owner, Scrum Master, Razvijalci), Dogodke (Planiranje, Dnevni Scrum, Pregled, Retrospektiva) in Artefakti (Produktni seznam, Seznam dela Sprinta, Inkrement).

q.en: Empiricism requires that the Scrum Team predict exactly what will happen in the next Sprint.
q.sl: Kaj sta Scrum dogodki?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. Empiricism is about learning from evidence and adapting based on what is observed. Forecasts evolve as more is learned; exact prediction is neither possible nor required.
why.sl: Scrum dogodki so urejeni časovni okviri ki vodijo Scrum proces: Planiranje Sprinta, Dnevni Scrum, Pregled Sprinta in Retrospektiva Sprinta.

q.en: Why is transparency of the Definition of Done particularly critical in Scrum?
q.sl: Ali je mogoče preskočiti Scrum dogodek?

options.en: So Developers know when to stop working
So the Product Owner can enforce quality standards
Without a shared, transparent DoD, the team cannot reliably assess what is truly done and make sound decisions
To impress stakeholders with quality
options.sl: Da, če je Scrum Master odobri

why.en: Transparency of the DoD allows the team to inspect whether work actually meets the commitment. Without it, hidden defects accumulate and decisions are made on incomplete information.
why.sl: Scrum eventi so obvezni in so del jedra Scrum okvira. Preskakovanje jih bi ogrozilo Scrum proces in preglednost.

q.en: A team member says 'We've always done it this way.' How does empiricism respond to this claim?
q.sl: Kaj je odvisnost med Scrum dogodki?

options.en: Accept it — tradition is reliable
options.sl: Niso odvisni, so vrste naključnega reda

options.en: Ignore it — new methods are always better
options.sl: Planiranje Sprinta → Dnevni Scrum → Pregled Sprinta → Retrospektiva Sprinta

options.en: Inspect whether it still serves the team's goals; if evidence shows a better way, adapt
Ask management to decide

why.en: Empiricism requires inspection and adaptation. 'We've always done it' is not evidence. The team inspects results and adapts practices based on what works now.
why.sl: Scrum dogodki se izvajajo v doslednem vrstnem redu v vsaki Sprint: Planiranje Sprinta (na začetku), nato Dnevni Scrum (vsak dan), Pregled Sprinta in Retrospektiva Sprinta (na koncu).

q.en: Which of the following support transparency in a Scrum Team? (Select all that apply)
q.sl: Kaj je artefakt v Scrum?

options.en: A visible, updated Sprint Backlog showing progress toward the Sprint Goal
options.sl: Vidni, posodobljeni Seznam Sprinta, ki prikazuje napredek proti Cilju Sprinta

options.en: Regular, honest Daily Scrums where Developers talk about impediments
options.sl: Redni, iskreni Dnevni Scrumi, na katerih Razvijalci govorijo o ovirah

options.en: An evolving Definition of Done that reflects quality standards
options.sl: Razvijajoča se Definicija Končanega, ki odraža standarde kakovosti

options.en: Hiding known issues until the Sprint Review to avoid worry
options.sl: Prikrivanje znanih težav do Pregleda Sprinta, da se izognemo skrbem

options.en: Clear Product Backlog ordering that the team understands
options.sl: Jasno urejeni Seznam Izdelka, ki ga tim razume

why.en: Transparency comes from visible artifacts (Sprint Backlog, Product Backlog), honest communication (Daily Scrums), and a shared Definition of Done. Hiding issues destroys transparency.
why.sl: Artefakti v Scrum so informacija in dela ki izhajajo iz Scrum procesa: Produktni seznam, Seznam dela Sprinta, Inkrement in spremljajući metriki.

q.en: A Developer says, 'I finished my task, but I haven't integrated it yet.' The most Scrum-aligned response is:
q.sl: Koliko Scrum artefaktov je?

options.en: Great, you're done for the day
It's only done when it meets the Definition of Done — work is not complete until integrated and tested
options.sl: Dva, Produktni seznam in Seznam dela Sprinta

options.en: Integration is the Product Owner's responsibility
options.sl: Tri, Produktni seznam, Seznam dela Sprinta in Inkrement

options.en: Done means deployed to production

why.en: Done means work meets the Definition of Done. Typically that includes integration, testing, and ready for release. 'Finished my part' is not the same as Done.
why.sl: Glavnih Scrum artefaktov so tri: Produktni seznam (Product Backlog), Seznam dela Sprinta (Sprint Backlog) in Inkrement (Increment). To je jedro vidljivosti in preglednosti v Scrum.

q.en: The Scrum Team discovers mid-Sprint that they misunderstood a critical requirement. The Scrum Master should facilitate:
q.sl: Kaj je glavna razlika med Produktnim seznamom in Seznamom dela Sprinta?

options.en: Continuing with the misunderstanding to avoid disruption
A conversation with the Product Owner to clarify and renegotiate scope within the Sprint Goal if needed
options.sl: Produktni seznam je za celo proizvod, Seznam dela Sprinta je za trenutni Sprint

options.en: Cancelling the Sprint immediately
options.sl: Produktni seznam je samo za Product Ownerja, Seznam dela Sprinta je samo za Razvijalce

options.en: Asking Developers to work extra hours to fix the misunderstanding

why.en: Inspection and adaptation are core. The SM helps the team and PO clarify, then adjust the Sprint Backlog. Pushing forward with wrong understanding wastes value.
why.sl: Produktni seznam je dinamična lista vseh potencialnih del za proizvod, Seznam dela Sprinta pa je list elementov ki so izbrani za ta Sprint in kako se bodo izvedli.

q.en: Management wants the Scrum Team to adopt a mandatory hand-off process for code reviews. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Kdo lahko doda element v produktni seznam?

options.en: Implement the new process immediately to keep management happy and supportive
Ban the new process outright to protect the team's self-management autonomy
Coach team and management on self-management and cross-functionality; assess whether the process serves quality
Let the Developers vote on whether to accept the proposed mandatory process

why.en: The SM serves both the team and the organization. Imposed processes may undermine self-management or efficiency. The SM coaches on empirical evidence and helps find a path forward.
why.sl: Kdor kot je deležnik, vključeno zaposleni, stranke, lahko prispevajo ideje. Product Owner je pa odgovoren za upravljanje, validacijo in prioritizacijo teh elementov.

q.en: A talented Developer says they don't like Scrum ceremonies and wants to skip the Daily Scrum. How should the Scrum Master respond?
q.sl: Ali je mogoče, da Razvijalci odklonijo element iz Sprinta med izvajanjem?

options.en: Let them skip the Daily Scrum — talented individuals deserve scheduling flexibility
Make Daily Scrum attendance mandatory for the Developer with no further discussion
options.sl: Da, ako jim je nemogoče ga implementirati

options.en: Coach the Developer on the Daily Scrum's purpose; if concerns persist, address root causes (format, timing)
options.sl: Da, samo s privolitvijo Product Ownerja

options.en: Move the Daily Scrum to a time that works only for the rest of the team's preferences

why.en: The SM coaches on Scrum fundamentals and listens to concerns. If a ceremony isn't working, the SM facilitates improvement — adjusting format, time, or approach — rather than forcing or enabling avoidance.
why.sl: Razvijalci ne morejo unilateralno odkloniti element, vendar če je nemogoče, morajo javiti Product Ownerju in skupaj oceniti situacijo. To je komunikacija in usklajevanje.

q.en: The organization operates in a matrix structure where Developers report to functional managers. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Kaj je narediti, če obstoji bug v Inkremente?

options.en: Avoid the matrix conflict — managing reporting structures is not the SM's concern
Negotiate clarity: members report to the SM for Scrum work; functional managers handle career paths
options.sl: Dodati ga v produktni seznam kot element in prioritizirati ga

options.en: Tell the functional managers their authority over Scrum Team members is invalid
options.sl: Vpročiti ga v trenutni Sprint kot novo nalogo

options.en: Recommend the organization eliminate all functional managers to remove the conflict

why.en: Serving the organization includes helping it adapt structures to Scrum. The SM negotiates clarity on authority and reporting so the team can self-manage Scrum work.
why.sl: Bug je mogoče obravnavati kot element produktnega seznama in ga prioritizirati, ali pa ga naslednji razvijalci sami popravijo kot del nove implementacije.

q.en: A Product Owner has not participated in refinement and arrives at Sprint Planning unprepared. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Kako je meriti napredek v Scrum?

options.en: Cancel the Sprint Planning and reschedule
Have the Developers select items without PO input
options.sl: Odrobno primerjati napredek glede na cilj Sprinta

options.en: Coach the PO on the importance of refinement and readiness; postpone Planning if needed to protect quality
Skip Sprint Planning this Sprint

why.en: Effective planning requires a prepared PO. The SM coaches on the process and protects the team from making uninformed selections. Skipping or working unprepared undermines empiricism.
why.sl: Napredek se meri kontinuirano glede na cilj Sprinta in je viden v Dnevnem Scrumo, seznamu dela Sprinta in Inkremente. To je osnova za prilagoditev.

q.en: During the Sprint, a business crisis occurs and an executive demands the team drop current work to handle it. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Kaj je "burn-down" graf?

options.en: Tell the team to ignore the executive
Immediately shift all team members to the crisis
options.sl: Graf ki prikaže zmanjšanje dela v Sprintu skozi čas

options.en: Help the executive, the Product Owner, and the team understand the consequences and work through the decision empirically
Tell the executive that Scrum doesn't allow interruptions

why.en: The SM serves the organization and the team. Urgent requests happen. The SM facilitates transparent discussion of trade-offs: What gets dropped? What's the real impact on the Sprint Goal? This is the PO's call with full information.
why.sl: Burn-down graf prikaže kako se dela (elementi/točke) v seznamu dela Sprinta zmanjšuje skozi čas. Pomaga nam videti ali je tim na pravi poti.

q.en: The Developers want to refactor legacy code, but the Product Owner sees no user-facing value. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Kaj je "burn-up" graf?

options.en: Side with the PO — refactoring is not valuable
Side with the Developers — technical work is always important
options.sl: Graf ki prikaže kako se Inkrement povečuje skozi čas

options.en: Facilitate a conversation about quality, speed, and the Product Goal; help both sides see trade-offs and make an informed choice
Split the Sprint between refactoring and features

why.en: This is a genuine tension between quality and throughput. The SM doesn't referee with authority; they coach both sides to understand that technical debt slows future value and refactoring serves the Product Goal.
why.sl: Burn-up graf prikaže kako se Inkrement (končanega dela) povečuje skozi čas. To je komplementarna slika burn-downu in prikazuje pozitiven napredek.

q.en: A Scrum Team has been stable for two years. Team members suggest removing some ceremonies to 'move faster.' The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Kaj je kapaciteta Sprinta ali "Sprint capacity"?

options.en: Approve the change — experienced teams genuinely need less event overhead
Refuse — Scrum requires all events and the team must continue running them
options.sl: Količina dela ki ga tim lahko izvede v Sprintu

options.en: Inspect the concern: why do events feel slow? Adapt format and time-boxing, but don't skip events.
Compromise by reducing the Daily Scrum to 10 minutes and trimming other events

why.en: Events are not optional, but their execution can improve. If ceremonies feel inefficient, the SM helps the team inspect and adapt the format — not eliminate them.
why.sl: Sprint kapaciteta je količina dela (ordinalno izražena v točkah ali drugih merenih) ki jo tim realističnem oceni da more narediti v Sprintu na osnovi zgodovine.

q.en: The Sprint Review is scheduled but no stakeholders have confirmed attendance. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Kaj je hitrost ali velociteta tima?

options.en: Cancel the Sprint Review
Hold the Sprint Review anyway with only the team present
options.sl: Količina dela ki ga tim pravoceno izpelje v Sprintu

options.en: Work to secure stakeholder attendance; if not possible, reschedule to ensure collaboration happens
options.sl: Pohitrost od ene do druge lokacije

options.en: Have the Scrum Master represent stakeholder feedback

why.en: The Sprint Review is a working session for the Scrum Team to inspect the Increment with stakeholders. Without them, critical feedback is lost. The SM ensures the event serves its purpose.
why.sl: Velociteta tima je količina dela ki je tim izvedel v prejšnjim Sprintih. To se uporablja za planiranje in je pokazatelja zmogljivosti tima.

q.en: A retrospective reveals that the team feels disrespected by management's attitude toward their work. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Ali je mogoče, da je velociteta tima različna od Sprinta do Sprinta?

options.en: Tell the team to ignore management's attitude and focus on delivering value
Coach the team to be more resilient about external disrespect from leadership
options.sl: Da, je odvisna od različnih faktorjev

options.en: Facilitate the team's improvement action and coach the organization on respect and psychological safety
options.sl: Da, samo če je Manager rokazati

options.en: Cancel the next Retrospective to give the team a break from negative reflection

why.en: Respect is a Scrum Value. If the team names this as an impediment, the SM coaches both the team and the organization to address root causes of disrespect.
why.sl: Da, velociteta se lahko razlikuje glede na različne dejavnike (bolezen, sprememba članov, novice v procesu). To je razumevanja in je osnova za fleksibilno planiranje.

q.en: Two Developers strongly disagree on whether work meets the Definition of Done. How should this be resolved?
q.sl: Kaj je ocenjevanje v Scrum?

options.en: The Scrum Master decides the disagreement on behalf of the Developers
The Product Owner decides since the work supports their backlog item
options.sl: Proces ocenjevanja velikosti in kompleksnosti elementov

options.en: The Developers as self-managing professionals resolve it, clarifying the DoD as a team
Escalate the disagreement to a separate quality assurance department for ruling

why.en: Self-management means the Developers collectively resolve internal disagreements on quality and process. If the DoD is ambiguous, the team clarifies it together.
why.sl: Ocenjevanje je proces v katerem tim skupaj oceni velikost ali kompleksnost elementov (pogosto z uporabiti Fibonaccija škale). To pomaga pri planiranju in kapaciteti.

q.en: A Developer keeps adding features beyond the scope of the Sprint Backlog item without discussing it. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Ali je Product Owner del Razvijalce?

options.en: Praise the Developer for going above and beyond the agreed Sprint scope
options.sl: Da, Product Owner je tudi razvijalec

options.en: Tell the Developer to stop adding scope and stick strictly to the Sprint Backlog
options.sl: Ne, Product Owner in Razvijalci so ločene vloge

options.en: Coach the Developer and team on transparent scope: discuss any changes with the PO and the team openly
Report the Developer to management for not following the agreed Sprint plan

why.en: Scope creep undermines transparency and planning. The SM coaches on collaboration: if work changes, the team and PO know. The SM also helps the team understand the impact on focus and the Sprint Goal.
why.sl: Product Owner je ordinalno ločena vloga od Razvijalcev, čeprav tehnički je mogoče biti oba (kar je redko in pogosto problematično). Jasna ločitev je priporočena.

q.en: The Product Owner and a major stakeholder disagree on priority. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Kaj je vloga Scrum Mastera pri Razvijalcah?

options.en: Take a vote
Coach both to reach consensus, but ultimately support the Product Owner's authority to order the Product Backlog
options.sl: Omogočevalec in spremljava da se tim izpopolni za Scrum

options.en: Delay the decision until the next retrospective
Override the PO and follow the stakeholder's preference

why.en: The PO is accountable for Product Backlog ordering and maximizing value. The SM helps the PO engage with stakeholders and hear their input, but the final call is the PO's.
why.sl: Scrum Master je omogočevalec in trener, ki pomaga Razvijalcem razumeti Scrum, se držati procesa in se odpravi ovire. Ni direktni nadzor ali ukazovanje.

q.en: During Sprint Planning, the Developers commit to more work than their historical capacity suggests they can handle. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Kaj je "Definition of Ready"?

options.en: Force the Developers to reduce the Sprint commitment based on historical data
Let them commit fully; teams learn capacity by occasionally over-committing and missing
options.sl: Jasna predstava kaj se šteje kot dovolj dobro izpopolnjeno za Sprint

options.en: Facilitate a conversation: share historical data, discuss confidence, and coach on realistic forecasting
Skip the rest of Sprint Planning if the team's capacity is too uncertain to commit

why.en: The SM coaches the team on data-driven forecasting and self-management. Sharing past data helps them make realistic commitments; the team decides, not the SM.
why.sl: Definition of Ready (čeprav ni eksplicitno v Scrum Guide) je skupna razumevanje kaj mora biti element preden je izbran za Sprint — vključuje jasnost, sprjeemljivost, oceno.

q.en: A Scrum Team's Increment is complete but the business isn't ready to release it. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Ali je mogoče, da je Scrum Master tudi Product Owner?

options.en: Hold the Increment in a pending state with no review
Encourage the team to keep working on the same Backlog items
options.sl: Da, vendar je to redko in ima rizike

options.en: Coach the team that the Increment is done; work with the organization on release timing and the product roadmap
Tell the team not to mark items as Done
options.sl: Ja, ker ima Scrum Master več moči

why.en: A Done Increment is a Done Increment. Release timing is a business decision separate from Scrum. The SM helps the organization understand that Done doesn't always mean released immediately.
why.sl: Tehnički je možno, vendar je to redko in ima visoke rizike interesnih konfliktov. Ordinalno se priporoča jasne ločenje vlog, posebej v težjih organizacijah.

q.en: The Scrum Team works on a safety-critical system. Who is ultimately accountable for quality and completeness of the Increment?
q.sl: Kaj je Razvijalec v Scrum?

options.en: The quality assurance department, since the system is safety-critical
The Scrum Master, who is accountable for the team's effectiveness
options.sl: Oseba ki je odgovorna za ustvarjanje dela in doseganje cilja Sprinta

options.en: The whole Scrum Team, supported by their Definition of Done and organizational standards
Senior management, who set the safety requirements and bear regulatory risk

why.en: The Scrum Team is accountable for creating a valuable, useful Increment every Sprint. In high-risk domains, the DoD may be more stringent, but accountability remains with the team.
why.sl: Razvijalec v Scrum je oseba (ali skupna vloga) ki je odgovorna za stvarjenje Inkrementа — to vključuje razvoj, testiranje, dokumentacijo in drugega potrebnega dela.

q.en: A Scrum Team member is physically co-located with the team but emotionally withdrawn and doesn't speak in meetings. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Katera je največja prednost Scrum metodologije?

options.en: Force the Developer to speak up at every Daily Scrum and Sprint event
Leave them alone; introversion is a personal preference, not the SM's concern
options.sl: Fleksibilnost in hitro prilagoditev na spremembe

options.en: Coach the team on psychological safety, support the Developer individually, and create space for quiet voices
Recommend their removal from the team if the silence continues for several Sprints

why.en: Respect and courage are Scrum Values. The SM creates an environment where all voices are valued. This may involve one-on-ones, adjusting formats, or coaching the team on inclusion.
why.sl: Glavna prednost Scrum je fleksibilnost, empiričnost in hitro prilagoditev na spremembe zahtev in dejavnike. Omogoči pogosto povratne podatke in iterativni razvoj.

q.en: The Product Owner and Scrum Master are the same person. This arrangement:
q.sl: Ali je Scrum primeren za vse vrste projektov?

options.en: Is ideal — fewer people in roles means lower coordination overhead
Is forbidden by Scrum and creates a structural framework violation
options.sl: Ne, je najbolje za kompleksne in inovativne projekte

options.en: Can work if the person maintains role separation, but creates real conflicts of interest in practice
Should only be done in very small early-stage organizations with a small team

why.en: Scrum doesn't forbid one person holding two roles, but the accountabilities are distinct and often pull in different directions. It's possible but challenging.
why.sl: Scrum je najbolj uspešen za projekti s kompleksni in nenormalne zahtevami, kjer je povratna informacija ključna. V strogo naprednih projektih bi bil manj primeren.

q.en: A Scrum Team is distributed across three time zones. Daily Scrum attendance is low because of scheduling conflicts. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Kaj se zgodi, če Scrum tim ne more doseči cilja Sprinta?

options.en: Cancel the Daily Scrum since the schedule cannot accommodate every time zone
Make Daily Scrum attendance optional for Developers in the harder time zones
Facilitate the team finding a time everyone can join, or async formats that preserve inspection
options.sl: Delo se prenaša na naslednji Sprint, imamo analizo kaj se je zgodilo

options.en: Demand everyone join at the earliest time zone regardless of their local working hours

why.en: The Daily Scrum's purpose is inspection and adaptation. The SM helps the team find a format and timing that enables that purpose — whether synchronous or asynchronous.
why.sl: Sprint se zaključi kot načrtovano. Neizvršeni elementi se prenesejo v produkt seznam in ponovno ocenijo. Analiza v Retrospektivi pomaga izboljšati prihodnje Sprinte.

q.en: A Developer leaves the team mid-Sprint. The remaining Developers say they can absorb the work. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Ali je mogoče imeti bug v Inkremente?

options.en: Approve the team's choice to absorb the work and monitor delivery closely
options.sl: Ne, Inkrement mora biti brez bug

options.en: Recommend the Product Owner cancel the Sprint and start a new one fresh
options.sl: Da, vendar bugs morajo biti znani in sprejeti

options.en: Facilitate the team inspecting the impact: is the Sprint Goal still achievable, and is scope renegotiation needed?
options.sl: Da, in to je povsem normalno

options.en: Hire a replacement Developer immediately to backfill the missing capacity

why.en: The SM helps the team inspect and adapt to the change. The team decides whether to press on, adjust scope, or escalate. Self-management means the team owns the decision with good information.
why.sl: Tehnički je mogoče, vendar bi bugs morali biti znani, prioritizirani in naslovljeni. Cilj je minimizirati bugs in zagotoviti da so kritični bugs odpravljeni pred procesom.

q.en: The organization is considering moving to a predictive, waterfall approach for a new project. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Kaj je narediti, če se med Sprintom odkrije visoko prioriteto zahtevo?

options.en: Insist Scrum is mandatory
Support Waterfall — Scrum isn't right for all projects
Coach the organization on empiricism and Scrum; help them understand when Scrum is a good fit and when other approaches may be better
options.sl: Dodati ga v produktni seznam in oceniti prioriteto

options.en: Resign

why.en: The SM serves the organization by training and coaching on Scrum and empirical product development. This includes helping the org understand context and choosing wisely.
why.sl: Nova zahteva se doda v produktni seznam. Product Owner oceni prioriteto in je mogoče biti izbrana za ta Sprint samo ako se Razvijalci strinjajo in ima kapaciteto.

q.en: Developers are burned out and working weekends to keep up. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Ali je mogoče, da se Sprint zaključi pred ravno časovno razmejitvijo?

options.en: Praise the team's dedication and commitment to delivering the Sprint Goal
options.sl: Ne, mora trajati točno dogovor čas

options.en: Tell the Developers to stop the weekend work and rest more between Sprints
options.sl: Da, če je cilj dosežen in nema več dela

options.en: Identify systemic causes (forecasting, scope creep, debt) and coach the team and organization on root causes
Reduce the Sprint length to make weeks shorter and reduce overall pressure

why.en: Burnout signals an impediment. The SM coaches empirically: What's the root cause? Unrealistic expectations? Lack of skills? Technical debt slowing progress? Address the cause, not just the symptom.
why.sl: Sprint ima fiksno časovno razmejitvijo. Ordinalno se zaključi pri dogovorjenem terminu, čeprav je tehnički mogoče ga zaključiti prej če je res vse narejeno in nema več dela.

q.en: A Scrum Team's Retrospective action items are never completed. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Kaj je "pairing" ali "pair programming" v Scrum?

options.en: Stop holding retrospectives
Make action items optional
options.sl: Praksa ko dve persone skupaj delata na kodi

options.en: Coach the team on prioritizing improvements; help identify which action is most impactful and commit to it in the next Sprint
Assign action items to individuals for accountability

why.en: Continuous improvement requires follow-through. The SM helps the team prioritize and own improvements. Often, one high-impact action in the Sprint Backlog is better than many half-done ones.
why.sl: Pairing (parno programiranje) je praksa ko dve persone skupaj delata na istim kodom, kar izboljšuje kakovost in to je praksa ki jo nekateri timi uporabljajo.

q.en: The Scrum Team disagrees with the organizational Definition of Done and wants to lower standards. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Kaj je "mobbing" ali "mob programming" v razvoju?

options.en: Allow the change — team ownership of the Definition of Done is a key Scrum principle
Enforce the organizational DoD strictly with no team-level adjustments allowed at all
options.sl: Več oseb skupaj dela na istim kodom

options.en: Facilitate the team inspecting why; discuss quality impacts and technical debt to surface the full picture
Create a separate Definition of Done for this team alone, isolated from organization standards

why.en: If the organization has a DoD standard, the team must follow it as a minimum. However, the SM coaches on why it exists and explores whether the concern signals a real problem (unclear DoD, unrealistic expectations, skill gaps).
why.sl: Mob programming je praksa ko več članov tima skupaj delata na istim kodom, kar izboljšuje deljenje znanja in lahko izboljšuje kakovost koda.

q.en: A Scrum Master is coaching a team new to Scrum. What is the primary message about self-management?
q.sl: Kateri so ključne metriki za sledenje Scrum projektу?

options.en: Do whatever you want; there are no rules
The team decides who does what, when, and how — within the framework of Scrum and the Sprint Goal
options.sl: Velociteta tima, burn-down, zadovoljstvo deležnikov, kakovost

options.en: The Scrum Master will tell you what to do
Self-management means you never need guidance

why.en: Self-managing doesn't mean 'no guidance' or 'chaos.' The team owns how it works within the Scrum framework, Sprint commitments, and organizational context.
why.sl: Ključne metriki vključujejo velociteto (hitrost dela), burn-down/burn-up (napredek), zadovoljstvo deležnikov in kakovost Inkrementа. Ti indikatorji vodijo kontinuirano izboljšavo.
